authors_text: Shahbaz Rezaei,Xin Liu
title: On the Discredibility of Membership Inference Attacks
title_zh: 关于成员推理攻击的可信度
abstract: With the wide-spread application of machine learning models, it has become critical to study the potential data leakage of models trained on sensitive data. Recently, various membership inference (MI) attacks are proposed to determine if a sample was part of the training set or not. The question is whether these attacks can be reliably used in practice. We show that MI models frequently misclassify neighboring nonmember samples of a member sample as members. In other words, they have a high false positive rate on the subpopulations of the exact member samples that they can identify. We then showcase a practical application of MI attacks where this issue has a real-world repercussion. Here, MI attacks are used by an external auditor (investigator) to show to a judge/jury that an auditee unlawfully used sensitive data. Due to the high false positive rate of MI attacks on member's subpopulations, auditee challenges the credibility of the auditor by revealing the performance of the MI attacks on these subpopulations. We argue that current membership inference attacks can identify memorized subpopulations, but they cannot reliably identify which exact sample in the subpopulation was used during the training.
summary: With the wide-spread application of machine learning models, it has become critical to study the potential data leakage of models trained on sensitive data. Recently, various membership inference (MI) attacks are proposed to determine if a sample was part of the training set or not. The question is whether these attacks can be reliably used in practice. We show that MI models frequently misclassify neighboring nonmember samples of a member sample as members. In other words, they have a high false positive rate on the subpopulations of the exact member samples that they can identify. We then showcase a practical application of MI attacks where this issue has a real-world repercussion. Here, MI attacks are used by an external auditor (investigator) to show to a judge/jury that an auditee unlawfully used sensitive data. Due to the high false positive rate of MI attacks on member's subpopulations, auditee challenges the credibility of the auditor by revealing the performance of the MI attacks on these subpopulations. We argue that current membership inference attacks can identify memorized subpopulations, but they cannot reliably identify which exact sample in the subpopulation was used during the training.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习模型的广泛应用，研究敏感数据训练模型的潜在数据泄露变得至关重要。最近，提出了各种成员推理（MI）攻击来确定样本是否是训练集的一部分。问题是这些攻击是否可以在实践中可靠地使用。我们表明，MI 模型经常将成员样本的相邻非成员样本错误分类为成员。换句话说，他们对他们可以识别的确切成员样本的亚群有很高的假阳性率。然后，我们展示 MI 攻击的实际应用，其中该问题会产生现实世界的影响。在这里，外部审计师（调查员）使用 MI 攻击向法官/陪审团表明受审计方非法使用敏感数据。由于对成员群体的 MI 攻击误报率较高，受审核方通过揭示对这些群体的 MI 攻击的表现来挑战审核员的可信度。我们认为，当前的成员推理攻击可以识别记忆的子群体，但它们无法可靠地识别在训练过程中使用了子群体中的哪个确切样本。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了成员推理攻击（MI）在实际应用中的不可靠性，指出其在识别训练样本时存在高误判率问题。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习模型的广泛应用，研究模型是否泄露敏感数据变得关键，但现有MI攻击的可靠性尚未得到充分验证。
AI.method: 通过分析MI模型对成员样本邻近非成员样本的误分类现象，结合实际审计场景验证其高误判率的影响。
AI.result: MI攻击在识别成员样本子群体时存在显著的高假阳性率，无法准确判断具体样本是否属于训练集。
AI.conclusion: 当前MI攻击仅能识别记忆化的子群体，但无法可靠确定具体训练样本，其实际应用可信度存疑。

authors_text: Kazuki Shibata,Tomohiko Jimbo,Tadashi Odashima,Keisuke Takeshita,Takamitsu Matsubara
title: Learning Locally, Communicating Globally: Reinforcement Learning of Multi-robot Task Allocation for Cooperative Transport
title_zh: 本地学习，全球交流：协作运输的多机器人任务分配的强化学习
abstract: We consider task allocation for multi-object transport using a multi-robot system, in which each robot selects one object among multiple objects with different and unknown weights. The existing centralized methods assume the number of robots and tasks to be fixed, which is inapplicable to scenarios that differ from the learning environment. Meanwhile, the existing distributed methods limit the minimum number of robots and tasks to a constant value, making them applicable to various numbers of robots and tasks. However, they cannot transport an object whose weight exceeds the load capacity of robots observing the object. To make it applicable to various numbers of robots and objects with different and unknown weights, we propose a framework using multi-agent reinforcement learning for task allocation. First, we introduce a structured policy model consisting of 1) predesigned dynamic task priorities with global communication and 2) a neural network-based distributed policy model that determines the timing for coordination. The distributed policy builds consensus on the high-priority object under local observations and selects cooperative or independent actions. Then, the policy is optimized by multi-agent reinforcement learning through trial and error. This structured policy of local learning and global communication makes our framework applicable to various numbers of robots and objects with different and unknown weights, as demonstrated by numerical simulations.
summary: We consider task allocation for multi-object transport using a multi-robot system, in which each robot selects one object among multiple objects with different and unknown weights. The existing centralized methods assume the number of robots and tasks to be fixed, which is inapplicable to scenarios that differ from the learning environment. Meanwhile, the existing distributed methods limit the minimum number of robots and tasks to a constant value, making them applicable to various numbers of robots and tasks. However, they cannot transport an object whose weight exceeds the load capacity of robots observing the object. To make it applicable to various numbers of robots and objects with different and unknown weights, we propose a framework using multi-agent reinforcement learning for task allocation. First, we introduce a structured policy model consisting of 1) predesigned dynamic task priorities with global communication and 2) a neural network-based distributed policy model that determines the timing for coordination. The distributed policy builds consensus on the high-priority object under local observations and selects cooperative or independent actions. Then, the policy is optimized by multi-agent reinforcement learning through trial and error. This structured policy of local learning and global communication makes our framework applicable to various numbers of robots and objects with different and unknown weights, as demonstrated by numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用多机器人系统进行多物体运输的任务分配，其中每个机器人从具有不同且未知重量的多个物体中选择一个物体。现有的集中式方法假设机器人和任务的数量是固定的，这不适用于不同于学习环境的场景。同时，现有的分布式方法将机器人和任务的最小数量限制为恒定值，使其适用于各种数量的机器人和任务。然而，它们无法运输重量超过观察该物体的机器人负载能力的物体。为了使其适用于各种数量的机器人和具有不同和未知权重的物体，我们提出了一个使用多智能体强化学习进行任务分配的框架。首先，我们引入一个结构化策略模型，其中包括：1）具有全局通信功能的预先设计的动态任务优先级；2）基于神经网络的分布式策略模型，用于确定协调的时间。分布式策略根据局部观察对高优先级对象建立共识，并选择合作或独立行动。然后，通过多智能体强化学习通过反复试验来优化策略。正如数值模拟所证明的那样，这种本地学习和全球通信的结构化策略使我们的框架适用于各种数量的机器人和具有不同和未知重量的物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多智能体强化学习的多机器人任务分配框架，用于解决多物体运输中的动态任务分配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有集中式方法假设机器人和任务数量固定，无法适应环境变化；分布式方法虽支持数量变化，但无法处理单个机器人负载不足的重物运输问题。
AI.method: 设计包含全局通信的动态任务优先级机制与神经网络分布式策略模型，通过局部观测达成高优先级物体共识，并利用多智能体强化学习优化策略。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了框架在不同机器人数量和未知物体重量场景下的有效性，实现了协作运输的自适应任务分配。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过局部学习与全局通信结合的结构化策略，解决了多机器人系统在动态环境下的任务分配难题。

authors_text: Qiang Zhang,Lingfang Yang,Xiaoliang Zhang,Xiaolin Song,Zhi Huang
title: Visual Area of Interests based Multimodal Trajectory Prediction for Probabilistic Risk Assessment
title_zh: 基于兴趣视觉区域的概率风险评估多模态轨迹预测
abstract: Accurate and reliable prediction of driving intentions and future trajectories contributes to cooperation between human drivers and ADAS in complex traffic environments. This paper proposes a visual AOI (Area of Interest) based multimodal trajectory prediction model for probabilistic risk assessment at intersections. In this study, we find that the visual AOI implies the driving intention and is about 0.6-2.1 s ahead of the operation. Therefore, we designed a trajectory prediction model that integrates the driving intention (DI) and the multimodal trajectory (MT) predictions. The DI model was pre-trained independently to extract the driving intention using features including the visual AOI, historical vehicle states, and environmental context. The intention prediction experiments verify that the visual AOI-based DI model predicts steering intention 0.925 s ahead of the actual steering operation. The trained DI model is then integrated into the trajectory prediction model to filter multimodal trajectories. The trajectory prediction experiments show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art models. Risk assessment for traffics at intersections verifies that the proposed method achieves high accuracy and a low false alarm rate, and identifies the potential risk about 3 s before a conflict occurs.
summary: Accurate and reliable prediction of driving intentions and future trajectories contributes to cooperation between human drivers and ADAS in complex traffic environments. This paper proposes a visual AOI (Area of Interest) based multimodal trajectory prediction model for probabilistic risk assessment at intersections. In this study, we find that the visual AOI implies the driving intention and is about 0.6-2.1 s ahead of the operation. Therefore, we designed a trajectory prediction model that integrates the driving intention (DI) and the multimodal trajectory (MT) predictions. The DI model was pre-trained independently to extract the driving intention using features including the visual AOI, historical vehicle states, and environmental context. The intention prediction experiments verify that the visual AOI-based DI model predicts steering intention 0.925 s ahead of the actual steering operation. The trained DI model is then integrated into the trajectory prediction model to filter multimodal trajectories. The trajectory prediction experiments show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art models. Risk assessment for traffics at intersections verifies that the proposed method achieves high accuracy and a low false alarm rate, and identifies the potential risk about 3 s before a conflict occurs.
abstract_zh: 准确可靠地预测驾驶意图和未来轨迹有助于人类驾驶员与 ADAS 在复杂交通环境中的协作。本文提出了一种基于视觉 AOI（感兴趣区域）的多模态轨迹预测模型，用于交叉口概率风险评估。在本研究中，我们发现视觉 AOI 暗示了驾驶意图，并且大约提前于操作 0.6-2.1 秒。因此，我们设计了一个集成驾驶意图（DI）和多模态轨迹（MT）预测的轨迹预测模型。 DI 模型经过独立预训练，利用视觉 AOI、历史车辆状态和环境背景等特征提取驾驶意图。意图预测实验验证了基于视觉 AOI 的 DI 模型能够比实际转向操作提前 0.925 s 预测转向意图。然后将经过训练的 DI 模型集成到轨迹预测模型中以过滤多模态轨迹。轨迹预测实验表明，所提出的模型优于最先进的模型。通过对路口交通进行风险评估，验证了该方法准确率高、误报率低，能够在冲突发生前3 s左右识别出潜在风险。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉兴趣区域（AOI）的多模态轨迹预测模型，用于交叉路口的概率风险评估，以提升自动驾驶系统与人类驾驶员的协作能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂交通环境中难以准确预测驾驶意图和轨迹，导致人与自动驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）协作效率低下，需结合视觉信息提前识别风险。
AI.method: 设计融合驾驶意图（DI）与多模态轨迹（MT）预测的模型，DI模块通过视觉AOI、历史车辆状态及环境上下文预训练，再集成至轨迹预测模型中过滤多模态轨迹。
AI.result: DI模型可提前0.925秒预测转向意图，轨迹预测优于现有方法，风险评估准确率高且误报率低，能提前3秒识别潜在冲突风险。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升轨迹预测精度与风险评估能力，为自动驾驶系统的安全决策提供可靠支持。

search_text: Visual Area of Interests based Multimodal Trajectory Prediction for Probabilistic Risk Assessment 基于兴趣视觉区域的概率风险评估多模态轨迹预测 Accurate and reliable prediction of driving intentions and future trajectories contributes to cooperation between human drivers and ADAS in complex traffic environments. This paper proposes a visual AOI (Area of Interest) based multimodal trajectory prediction model for probabilistic risk assessment at intersections. In this study, we find that the visual AOI implies the driving intention and is about 0.6-2.1 s ahead of the operation. Therefore, we designed a trajectory prediction model that integrates the driving intention (DI) and the multimodal trajectory (MT) predictions. The DI model was pre-trained independently to extract the driving intention using features including the visual AOI, historical vehicle states, and environmental context. The intention prediction experiments verify that the visual AOI-based DI model predicts steering intention 0.925 s ahead of the actual steering operation. The trained DI model is then integrated into the trajectory prediction model to filter multimodal trajectories. The trajectory prediction experiments show that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art models. Risk assessment for traffics at intersections verifies that the proposed method achieves high accuracy and a low false alarm rate, and identifies the potential risk about 3 s before a conflict occurs. 准确可靠地预测驾驶意图和未来轨迹有助于人类驾驶员与 ADAS 在复杂交通环境中的协作。本文提出了一种基于视觉 AOI（感兴趣区域）的多模态轨迹预测模型，用于交叉口概率风险评估。在本研究中，我们发现视觉 AOI 暗示了驾驶意图，并且大约提前于操作 0.6-2.1 秒。因此，我们设计了一个集成驾驶意图（DI）和多模态轨迹（MT）预测的轨迹预测模型。 DI 模型经过独立预训练，利用视觉 AOI、历史车辆状态和环境背景等特征提取驾驶意图。意图预测实验验证了基于视觉 AOI 的 DI 模型能够比实际转向操作提前 0.925 s 预测转向意图。然后将经过训练的 DI 模型集成到轨迹预测模型中以过滤多模态轨迹。轨迹预测实验表明，所提出的模型优于最先进的模型。通过对路口交通进行风险评估，验证了该方法准确率高、误报率低，能够在冲突发生前3 s左右识别出潜在风险。 本文提出一种基于视觉兴趣区域（AOI）的多模态轨迹预测模型，用于交叉路口的概率风险评估，以提升自动驾驶系统与人类驾驶员的协作能力。 Qiang Zhang,Lingfang Yang,Xiaoliang Zhang,Xiaolin Song,Zhi Huang cs.HC

authors_text: Kavya Sreedhar,Jason Clemons,Rangharajan Venkatesan,Stephen W. Keckler,Mark Horowitz
title: Vision Transformer Computation and Resilience for Dynamic Inference
title_zh: Vision Transformer 计算和动态推理弹性
comment: ef:2024 IEEE International Symposium on Performance Analysis of Systems and Software (ISPASS)
comments: ef:2024 IEEE International Symposium on Performance Analysis of Systems and Software (ISPASS)
abstract: State-of-the-art deep learning models for computer vision tasks are based on the transformer architecture and often deployed in real-time applications. In this scenario, the resources available for every inference can vary, so it is useful to be able to dynamically adapt execution to trade accuracy for efficiency. To create dynamic models, we leverage the resilience of vision transformers to pruning and switch between different scaled versions of a model. Surprisingly, we find that most FLOPs are generated by convolutions, not attention. These relative FLOP counts are not a good predictor of GPU performance since GPUs have special optimizations for convolutions. Some models are fairly resilient and their model execution can be adapted without retraining, while all models achieve better accuracy with retraining alternative execution paths. These insights mean that we can leverage CNN accelerators and these alternative execution paths to enable efficient and dynamic vision transformer inference. Our analysis shows that leveraging this type of dynamic execution can lead to saving 28\% of energy with a 1.4\% accuracy drop for SegFormer (63 GFLOPs), with no additional training, and 53\% of energy for ResNet-50 (4 GFLOPs) with a 3.3\% accuracy drop by switching between pretrained Once-For-All models.
summary: State-of-the-art deep learning models for computer vision tasks are based on the transformer architecture and often deployed in real-time applications. In this scenario, the resources available for every inference can vary, so it is useful to be able to dynamically adapt execution to trade accuracy for efficiency. To create dynamic models, we leverage the resilience of vision transformers to pruning and switch between different scaled versions of a model. Surprisingly, we find that most FLOPs are generated by convolutions, not attention. These relative FLOP counts are not a good predictor of GPU performance since GPUs have special optimizations for convolutions. Some models are fairly resilient and their model execution can be adapted without retraining, while all models achieve better accuracy with retraining alternative execution paths. These insights mean that we can leverage CNN accelerators and these alternative execution paths to enable efficient and dynamic vision transformer inference. Our analysis shows that leveraging this type of dynamic execution can lead to saving 28\% of energy with a 1.4\% accuracy drop for SegFormer (63 GFLOPs), with no additional training, and 53\% of energy for ResNet-50 (4 GFLOPs) with a 3.3\% accuracy drop by switching between pretrained Once-For-All models.
abstract_zh: 用于计算机视觉任务的最先进的深度学习模型基于 Transformer 架构，并且通常部署在实时应用程序中。在这种情况下，可用于每个推理的资源可能会有所不同，因此能够动态调整执行以牺牲准确性和效率是非常有用的。为了创建动态模型，我们利用视觉转换器的弹性来修剪模型的不同缩放版本并在模型之间进行切换。令人惊讶的是，我们发现大多数 FLOP 是由卷积生成的，而不是注意力。这些相对 FLOP 计数并不能很好地预测 GPU 性能，因为 GPU 对卷积进行了特殊优化。一些模型具有相当的弹性，它们的模型执行可以在不重新训练的情况下进行调整，而所有模型都可以通过重新训练替代执行路径来实现更好的准确性。这些见解意味着我们可以利用 CNN 加速器和这些替代执行路径来实现高效、动态的视觉变换器推理。我们的分析表明，利用这种类型的动态执行可以节省 28% 的能源，SegFormer (63 GFLOPs) 无需额外训练，准确率下降 1.4%；通过在预训练的 Once-For-All 模型之间切换，ResNet-50 (4 GFLOPs) 可以节省 53% 的能源，准确率下降 3.3%。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了如何通过动态调整视觉Transformer的推理过程，在资源受限的场景下实现计算效率与模型精度的平衡。
AI.motivation: 实时视觉任务中资源分配动态变化，需在不牺牲过多精度的前提下动态调整模型执行效率，而现有方法对Transformer计算特性的利用不足。
AI.method: 利用视觉Transformer对剪枝的鲁棒性，通过切换不同规模的模型版本实现动态推理；结合CNN加速器优化与预训练Once-For-All模型的多路径执行策略。
AI.result: 在SegFormer模型上实现28%能耗降低（精度下降1.4%），ResNet-50模型实现53%能耗降低（精度下降3.3%），且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: 动态执行策略可有效提升视觉Transformer的能效比，结合硬件优化与模型多路径设计是实现高效推理的关键方向。

authors_text: Zequan Xu,Lianyun Li,Hui Li,Qihang Sun,Shaofeng Hu,Rongrong Ji
title: Self-supervised Graph Representation Learning for Black Market Account Detection
title_zh: 用于黑市账户检测的自监督图表示学习
comment: WSDM 2023. This is the complete version containing the appendix
comments: WSDM 2023. This is the complete version containing the appendix
abstract: Nowadays, Multi-purpose Messaging Mobile App (MMMA) has become increasingly prevalent. MMMAs attract fraudsters and some cybercriminals provide support for frauds via black market accounts (BMAs). Compared to fraudsters, BMAs are not directly involved in frauds and are more difficult to detect. This paper illustrates our BMA detection system SGRL (Self-supervised Graph Representation Learning) used in WeChat, a representative MMMA with over a billion users. We tailor Graph Neural Network and Graph Self-supervised Learning in SGRL for BMA detection. The workflow of SGRL contains a pretraining phase that utilizes structural information, node attribute information and available human knowledge, and a lightweight detection phase. In offline experiments, SGRL outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 16.06%-58.17% on offline evaluation measures. We deploy SGRL in the online environment to detect BMAs on the billion-scale WeChat graph, and it exceeds the alternative by 7.27% on the online evaluation measure. In conclusion, SGRL can alleviate label reliance, generalize well to unseen data, and effectively detect BMAs in WeChat.
summary: Nowadays, Multi-purpose Messaging Mobile App (MMMA) has become increasingly prevalent. MMMAs attract fraudsters and some cybercriminals provide support for frauds via black market accounts (BMAs). Compared to fraudsters, BMAs are not directly involved in frauds and are more difficult to detect. This paper illustrates our BMA detection system SGRL (Self-supervised Graph Representation Learning) used in WeChat, a representative MMMA with over a billion users. We tailor Graph Neural Network and Graph Self-supervised Learning in SGRL for BMA detection. The workflow of SGRL contains a pretraining phase that utilizes structural information, node attribute information and available human knowledge, and a lightweight detection phase. In offline experiments, SGRL outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 16.06%-58.17% on offline evaluation measures. We deploy SGRL in the online environment to detect BMAs on the billion-scale WeChat graph, and it exceeds the alternative by 7.27% on the online evaluation measure. In conclusion, SGRL can alleviate label reliance, generalize well to unseen data, and effectively detect BMAs in WeChat.
abstract_zh: 如今，多用途消息移动应用程序（MMMA）变得越来越流行。 MMMA 吸引了欺诈者，一些网络犯罪分子通过黑市账户 (BMA) 为欺诈提供支持。与欺诈者相比，BMA 不直接参与欺诈，更难以被发现。本文介绍了我们在微信中使用的 BMA 检测系统 SGRL（自监督图表示学习），微信是拥有超过 10 亿用户的代表性 MMMA。我们在 SGRL 中定制图神经网络和图自监督学习用于 BMA 检测。 SGRL的工作流程包含利用结构信息、节点属性信息和可用人类知识的预训练阶段和轻量级检测阶段。在离线实验中，SGRL 在离线评估指标上的表现比最先进的方法高出 16.06%-58.17%。我们在在线环境中部署SGRL来检测十亿级微信图上的BMA，在线评估指标上它比替代方案高出7.27%。总之，SGRL 可以减轻标签依赖，很好地泛化到未见过的数据，并有效地检测微信中的 BMA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督图表示学习的黑市账户检测系统SGRL，用于微信等多用途即时通讯应用中的黑市账户识别。
AI.motivation: 黑市账户（BMA）未直接参与欺诈活动，传统检测方法依赖标签且效果有限，需利用图结构信息和自监督学习降低对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 设计SGRL系统，结合图神经网络与自监督学习，包含预训练阶段（利用结构信息、节点属性及人工知识）和轻量级检测阶段，实现对大规模用户图的高效分析。
AI.result: 离线实验中SGRL优于现有方法16.06%-58.17%，在线环境中检测效果提升7.27%，有效识别微信百亿级用户图中的黑市账户。
AI.conclusion: SGRL通过减少标签依赖性和增强泛化能力，成功实现了对微信黑市账户的有效检测，具备实际部署价值。

search_text: Self-supervised Graph Representation Learning for Black Market Account Detection 用于黑市账户检测的自监督图表示学习 Nowadays, Multi-purpose Messaging Mobile App (MMMA) has become increasingly prevalent. MMMAs attract fraudsters and some cybercriminals provide support for frauds via black market accounts (BMAs). Compared to fraudsters, BMAs are not directly involved in frauds and are more difficult to detect. This paper illustrates our BMA detection system SGRL (Self-supervised Graph Representation Learning) used in WeChat, a representative MMMA with over a billion users. We tailor Graph Neural Network and Graph Self-supervised Learning in SGRL for BMA detection. The workflow of SGRL contains a pretraining phase that utilizes structural information, node attribute information and available human knowledge, and a lightweight detection phase. In offline experiments, SGRL outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 16.06%-58.17% on offline evaluation measures. We deploy SGRL in the online environment to detect BMAs on the billion-scale WeChat graph, and it exceeds the alternative by 7.27% on the online evaluation measure. In conclusion, SGRL can alleviate label reliance, generalize well to unseen data, and effectively detect BMAs in WeChat. 如今，多用途消息移动应用程序（MMMA）变得越来越流行。 MMMA 吸引了欺诈者，一些网络犯罪分子通过黑市账户 (BMA) 为欺诈提供支持。与欺诈者相比，BMA 不直接参与欺诈，更难以被发现。本文介绍了我们在微信中使用的 BMA 检测系统 SGRL（自监督图表示学习），微信是拥有超过 10 亿用户的代表性 MMMA。我们在 SGRL 中定制图神经网络和图自监督学习用于 BMA 检测。 SGRL的工作流程包含利用结构信息、节点属性信息和可用人类知识的预训练阶段和轻量级检测阶段。在离线实验中，SGRL 在离线评估指标上的表现比最先进的方法高出 16.06%-58.17%。我们在在线环境中部署SGRL来检测十亿级微信图上的BMA，在线评估指标上它比替代方案高出7.27%。总之，SGRL 可以减轻标签依赖，很好地泛化到未见过的数据，并有效地检测微信中的 BMA。 本文提出一种基于自监督图表示学习的黑市账户检测系统SGRL，用于微信等多用途即时通讯应用中的黑市账户识别。 Zequan Xu,Lianyun Li,Hui Li,Qihang Sun,Shaofeng Hu,Rongrong Ji cs.SI,cs.AI

authors_text: Ajay Jaiswal,Tianlong Chen,Justin F. Rousseau,Yifan Peng,Ying Ding,Zhangyang Wang
title: Attend Who is Weak: Pruning-assisted Medical Image Localization under Sophisticated and Implicit Imbalances
title_zh: 关注谁是弱者：复杂和隐式不平衡下的剪枝辅助医学图像定位
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have rapidly become a \textit{de facto} choice for medical image understanding tasks. However, DNNs are notoriously fragile to the class imbalance in image classification. We further point out that such imbalance fragility can be amplified when it comes to more sophisticated tasks such as pathology localization, as imbalances in such problems can have highly complex and often implicit forms of presence. For example, different pathology can have different sizes or colors (w.r.t.the background), different underlying demographic distributions, and in general different difficulty levels to recognize, even in a meticulously curated balanced distribution of training data. In this paper, we propose to use pruning to automatically and adaptively identify \textit{hard-to-learn} (HTL) training samples, and improve pathology localization by attending them explicitly, during training in \textit{supervised, semi-supervised, and weakly-supervised} settings. Our main inspiration is drawn from the recent finding that deep classification models have difficult-to-memorize samples and those may be effectively exposed through network pruning \cite{hooker2019compressed} - and we extend such observation beyond classification for the first time. We also present an interesting demographic analysis which illustrates HTLs ability to capture complex demographic imbalances. Our extensive experiments on the Skin Lesion Localization task in multiple training settings by paying additional attention to HTLs show significant improvement of localization performance by $\sim$2-3\%.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have rapidly become a \textit{de facto} choice for medical image understanding tasks. However, DNNs are notoriously fragile to the class imbalance in image classification. We further point out that such imbalance fragility can be amplified when it comes to more sophisticated tasks such as pathology localization, as imbalances in such problems can have highly complex and often implicit forms of presence. For example, different pathology can have different sizes or colors (w.r.t.the background), different underlying demographic distributions, and in general different difficulty levels to recognize, even in a meticulously curated balanced distribution of training data. In this paper, we propose to use pruning to automatically and adaptively identify \textit{hard-to-learn} (HTL) training samples, and improve pathology localization by attending them explicitly, during training in \textit{supervised, semi-supervised, and weakly-supervised} settings. Our main inspiration is drawn from the recent finding that deep classification models have difficult-to-memorize samples and those may be effectively exposed through network pruning \cite{hooker2019compressed} - and we extend such observation beyond classification for the first time. We also present an interesting demographic analysis which illustrates HTLs ability to capture complex demographic imbalances. Our extensive experiments on the Skin Lesion Localization task in multiple training settings by paying additional attention to HTLs show significant improvement of localization performance by $\sim$2-3\%.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）已迅速成为医学图像理解任务的\textit{事实上}选择。然而，众所周知，DNN 对于图像分类中的类别不平衡非常脆弱。我们进一步指出，当涉及病理定位等更复杂的任务时，这种不平衡的脆弱性可能会被放大，因为此类问题中的不平衡可能具有高度复杂且通常隐含的存在形式。例如，即使在精心策划的训练数据平衡分布中，不同的病理学也可能具有不同的大小或颜色（相对于背景）、不同的潜在人口统计分布以及通常不同的识别难度级别。在本文中，我们建议使用剪枝来自动和自适应地识别 \textit{难以学习}（HTL）训练样本，并在 \textit{监督、半监督和弱监督}设置中的训练期间通过明确地关注它们来改进病理定位。我们的主要灵感来自于最近的发现，即深度分类模型具有难以记忆的样本，并且这些样本可以通过网络修剪\cite{hooker2019compressed}有效地暴露出来——并且我们首次将这种观察扩展到分类之外。我们还提出了一项有趣的人口统计分析，说明 HTL 捕捉复杂的人口统计失衡的能力。我们通过额外关注 HTL 在多个训练设置中对皮肤病变定位任务进行了广泛的实验，结果表明定位性能显着提高了 $\sim$2-3\%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于剪枝的医疗图像定位方法，通过识别并关注难以学习的样本以解决复杂隐性类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在医学图像分类任务中对类别不平衡敏感，而病理定位等复杂任务中的不平衡问题更隐晦且多样化，传统方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 利用网络剪枝技术自动识别难以学习（HTL）样本，并在监督、半监督和弱监督设置中通过显式关注这些样本优化定位性能。
AI.result: 在皮肤病变定位任务中，该方法在多种训练设置下实现约2-3%的定位性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 剪枝辅助的HTL样本关注机制能有效缓解医学图像中的隐性不平衡问题，且具有捕捉复杂人口统计学差异的潜力。

authors_text: Jose Muguira-Iturralde,Aidan Curtis,Yilun Du,Leslie Pack Kaelbling,Tomás Lozano-Pérez
title: Visibility-Aware Navigation Among Movable Obstacles
title_zh: 可移动障碍物之间的可见性感知导航
abstract: In this paper, we examine the problem of visibility-aware robot navigation among movable obstacles (VANAMO). A variant of the well-known NAMO robotic planning problem, VANAMO puts additional visibility constraints on robot motion and object movability. This new problem formulation lifts the restrictive assumption that the map is fully visible and the object positions are fully known. We provide a formal definition of the VANAMO problem and propose the Look and Manipulate Backchaining (LaMB) algorithm for solving such problems. LaMB has a simple vision-based API that makes it more easily transferable to real-world robot applications and scales to the large 3D environments. To evaluate LaMB, we construct a set of tasks that illustrate the complex interplay between visibility and object movability that can arise in mobile base manipulation problems in unknown environments. We show that LaMB outperforms NAMO and visibility-aware motion planning approaches as well as simple combinations of them on complex manipulation problems with partial observability.
summary: In this paper, we examine the problem of visibility-aware robot navigation among movable obstacles (VANAMO). A variant of the well-known NAMO robotic planning problem, VANAMO puts additional visibility constraints on robot motion and object movability. This new problem formulation lifts the restrictive assumption that the map is fully visible and the object positions are fully known. We provide a formal definition of the VANAMO problem and propose the Look and Manipulate Backchaining (LaMB) algorithm for solving such problems. LaMB has a simple vision-based API that makes it more easily transferable to real-world robot applications and scales to the large 3D environments. To evaluate LaMB, we construct a set of tasks that illustrate the complex interplay between visibility and object movability that can arise in mobile base manipulation problems in unknown environments. We show that LaMB outperforms NAMO and visibility-aware motion planning approaches as well as simple combinations of them on complex manipulation problems with partial observability.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了可移动障碍物中的可见性感知机器人导航问题（VANAMO）。 VANAMO 是著名的 NAMO 机器人规划问题的变体，它对机器人运动和物体可移动性施加了额外的可见性约束。这个新的问题表述解除了地图完全可见并且物体位置完全已知的限制性假设。我们提供了 VANAMO 问题的正式定义，并提出了用于解决此类问题的查找和操作后链 (LaMB) 算法。 LaMB 具有简单的基于视觉的 API，使其更容易转移到现实世界的机器人应用程序并扩展到大型 3D 环境。为了评估 LaMB，我们构建了一组任务，这些任务说明了未知环境中的移动基础操作问题中可能出现的可见性和对象可移动性之间的复杂相互作用。我们表明，在具有部分可观测性的复杂操作问题上，LaMB 的性能优于 NAMO 和可见性感知运动规划方法以及它们的简单组合。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在可见性受限和可移动障碍物环境下的机器人导航问题（VANAMO），提出了一种基于视觉的LaMB算法以解决部分可观测环境中的复杂操作任务。
AI.motivation: 传统导航方法假设环境全可见且障碍物位置固定，但实际场景中机器人常面临部分可观测性和动态障碍物的挑战，需发展适应复杂现实环境的导航算法。
AI.method: 提出Look and Manipulate Backchaining（LaMB）算法，通过视觉API实现对环境的动态感知与障碍物操作，支持大规模三维环境下的路径规划与物体移动策略生成。
AI.result: 实验表明LaMB在部分可观测的复杂操作任务中优于传统NAMO方法及现有可见性感知规划算法，尤其在动态障碍物交互场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次定义了VANAMO问题并提出LaMB算法，为机器人在未知动态环境中的导航与操作提供了新的解决方案，推动了现实场景中视觉感知与物理交互的结合。

search_text: Visibility-Aware Navigation Among Movable Obstacles 可移动障碍物之间的可见性感知导航 In this paper, we examine the problem of visibility-aware robot navigation among movable obstacles (VANAMO). A variant of the well-known NAMO robotic planning problem, VANAMO puts additional visibility constraints on robot motion and object movability. This new problem formulation lifts the restrictive assumption that the map is fully visible and the object positions are fully known. We provide a formal definition of the VANAMO problem and propose the Look and Manipulate Backchaining (LaMB) algorithm for solving such problems. LaMB has a simple vision-based API that makes it more easily transferable to real-world robot applications and scales to the large 3D environments. To evaluate LaMB, we construct a set of tasks that illustrate the complex interplay between visibility and object movability that can arise in mobile base manipulation problems in unknown environments. We show that LaMB outperforms NAMO and visibility-aware motion planning approaches as well as simple combinations of them on complex manipulation problems with partial observability. 在本文中，我们研究了可移动障碍物中的可见性感知机器人导航问题（VANAMO）。 VANAMO 是著名的 NAMO 机器人规划问题的变体，它对机器人运动和物体可移动性施加了额外的可见性约束。这个新的问题表述解除了地图完全可见并且物体位置完全已知的限制性假设。我们提供了 VANAMO 问题的正式定义，并提出了用于解决此类问题的查找和操作后链 (LaMB) 算法。 LaMB 具有简单的基于视觉的 API，使其更容易转移到现实世界的机器人应用程序并扩展到大型 3D 环境。为了评估 LaMB，我们构建了一组任务，这些任务说明了未知环境中的移动基础操作问题中可能出现的可见性和对象可移动性之间的复杂相互作用。我们表明，在具有部分可观测性的复杂操作问题上，LaMB 的性能优于 NAMO 和可见性感知运动规划方法以及它们的简单组合。 本文研究了在可见性受限和可移动障碍物环境下的机器人导航问题（VANAMO），提出了一种基于视觉的LaMB算法以解决部分可观测环境中的复杂操作任务。 Jose Muguira-Iturralde,Aidan Curtis,Yilun Du,Leslie Pack Kaelbling,Tomás Lozano-Pérez cs.RO

authors_text: Ethan M. Rudd,Mohammad Saidur Rahman,Philip Tully
title: Transformers for End-to-End InfoSec Tasks: A Feasibility Study
title_zh: 用于端到端信息安全任务的变压器：可行性研究
comment: Post-print of a manuscript accepted to ACM Asia-CCS Workshop on Robust Malware Analysis (WoRMA) 2022. 11 Pages total. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2011.03040
comments: Post-print of a manuscript accepted to ACM Asia-CCS Workshop on Robust Malware Analysis (WoRMA) 2022. 11 Pages total. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2011.03040
abstract: In this paper, we assess the viability of transformer models in end-to-end InfoSec settings, in which no intermediate feature representations or processing steps occur outside the model. We implement transformer models for two distinct InfoSec data formats - specifically URLs and PE files - in a novel end-to-end approach, and explore a variety of architectural designs, training regimes, and experimental settings to determine the ingredients necessary for performant detection models. We show that in contrast to conventional transformers trained on more standard NLP-related tasks, our URL transformer model requires a different training approach to reach high performance levels. Specifically, we show that 1) pre-training on a massive corpus of unlabeled URL data for an auto-regressive task does not readily transfer to binary classification of malicious or benign URLs, but 2) that using an auxiliary auto-regressive loss improves performance when training from scratch. We introduce a method for mixed objective optimization, which dynamically balances contributions from both loss terms so that neither one of them dominates. We show that this method yields quantitative evaluation metrics comparable to that of several top-performing benchmark classifiers. Unlike URLs, binary executables contain longer and more distributed sequences of information-rich bytes. To accommodate such lengthy byte sequences, we introduce additional context length into the transformer by providing its self-attention layers with an adaptive span similar to Sukhbaatar et al. We demonstrate that this approach performs comparably to well-established malware detection models on benchmark PE file datasets, but also point out the need for further exploration into model improvements in scalability and compute efficiency.
summary: In this paper, we assess the viability of transformer models in end-to-end InfoSec settings, in which no intermediate feature representations or processing steps occur outside the model. We implement transformer models for two distinct InfoSec data formats - specifically URLs and PE files - in a novel end-to-end approach, and explore a variety of architectural designs, training regimes, and experimental settings to determine the ingredients necessary for performant detection models. We show that in contrast to conventional transformers trained on more standard NLP-related tasks, our URL transformer model requires a different training approach to reach high performance levels. Specifically, we show that 1) pre-training on a massive corpus of unlabeled URL data for an auto-regressive task does not readily transfer to binary classification of malicious or benign URLs, but 2) that using an auxiliary auto-regressive loss improves performance when training from scratch. We introduce a method for mixed objective optimization, which dynamically balances contributions from both loss terms so that neither one of them dominates. We show that this method yields quantitative evaluation metrics comparable to that of several top-performing benchmark classifiers. Unlike URLs, binary executables contain longer and more distributed sequences of information-rich bytes. To accommodate such lengthy byte sequences, we introduce additional context length into the transformer by providing its self-attention layers with an adaptive span similar to Sukhbaatar et al. We demonstrate that this approach performs comparably to well-established malware detection models on benchmark PE file datasets, but also point out the need for further exploration into model improvements in scalability and compute efficiency.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们评估了 Transformer 模型在端到端 InfoSec 设置中的可行性，其中模型外部不会发生中间特征表示或处理步骤。我们以一种新颖的端到端方法为两种不同的 InfoSec 数据格式（特别是 URL 和 PE 文件）实现了转换器模型，并探索了各种架构设计、训练制度和实验设置，以确定高性能检测模型所需的要素。我们表明，与在更标准的 NLP 相关任务上训练的传统 Transformer 相比，我们的 URL Transformer 模型需要不同的训练方法才能达到高性能水平。具体来说，我们表明：1）针对自回归任务对大量未标记 URL 数据进行预训练并不容易转移到恶意或良性 URL 的二进制分类，但 2）使用辅助自回归损失可以提高从头开始训练时的性能。我们引入了一种混合目标优化方法，该方法动态平衡两个损失项的贡献，以便它们都不占主导地位。我们表明，该方法产生的定量评估指标可与几个表现最佳的基准分类器相媲美。与 URL 不同，二进制可执行文件包含更长、更分散的信息丰富的字节序列。为了适应如此长的字节序列，我们通过为其自注意力层提供类似于 Sukhbaatar 等人的自适应跨度，将额外的上下文长度引入到转换器中。我们证明了这种方法的性能与基准 PE 文件数据集上完善的恶意软件检测模型相当，但也指出需要进一步探索模型在可扩展性和计算效率方面的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了Transformer模型在端到端信息安全部署（如URL和PE文件检测）中的可行性，并探索了不同架构和训练方法的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 传统信息安全部署依赖特征工程和传统模型，而Transformer在NLP任务中表现优异，但其在端到端InfoSec场景中的适用性尚未明确，需验证其有效性并优化训练策略。
AI.method: 针对URL和PE文件分别设计Transformer模型：URL模型采用辅助自回归损失和混合目标优化；PE文件模型通过自适应跨度扩展上下文长度以处理长序列。
AI.result: URL模型混合目标优化方法性能接近基准分类器；PE文件模型在基准数据集上表现与现有方法相当，但需提升可扩展性与计算效率。
AI.conclusion: Transformer适用于端到端InfoSec任务，但需根据数据特性调整训练方式与模型结构，未来需进一步优化模型效率与扩展性。

search_text: Transformers for End-to-End InfoSec Tasks: A Feasibility Study 用于端到端信息安全任务的变压器：可行性研究 In this paper, we assess the viability of transformer models in end-to-end InfoSec settings, in which no intermediate feature representations or processing steps occur outside the model. We implement transformer models for two distinct InfoSec data formats - specifically URLs and PE files - in a novel end-to-end approach, and explore a variety of architectural designs, training regimes, and experimental settings to determine the ingredients necessary for performant detection models. We show that in contrast to conventional transformers trained on more standard NLP-related tasks, our URL transformer model requires a different training approach to reach high performance levels. Specifically, we show that 1) pre-training on a massive corpus of unlabeled URL data for an auto-regressive task does not readily transfer to binary classification of malicious or benign URLs, but 2) that using an auxiliary auto-regressive loss improves performance when training from scratch. We introduce a method for mixed objective optimization, which dynamically balances contributions from both loss terms so that neither one of them dominates. We show that this method yields quantitative evaluation metrics comparable to that of several top-performing benchmark classifiers. Unlike URLs, binary executables contain longer and more distributed sequences of information-rich bytes. To accommodate such lengthy byte sequences, we introduce additional context length into the transformer by providing its self-attention layers with an adaptive span similar to Sukhbaatar et al. We demonstrate that this approach performs comparably to well-established malware detection models on benchmark PE file datasets, but also point out the need for further exploration into model improvements in scalability and compute efficiency. 在本文中，我们评估了 Transformer 模型在端到端 InfoSec 设置中的可行性，其中模型外部不会发生中间特征表示或处理步骤。我们以一种新颖的端到端方法为两种不同的 InfoSec 数据格式（特别是 URL 和 PE 文件）实现了转换器模型，并探索了各种架构设计、训练制度和实验设置，以确定高性能检测模型所需的要素。我们表明，与在更标准的 NLP 相关任务上训练的传统 Transformer 相比，我们的 URL Transformer 模型需要不同的训练方法才能达到高性能水平。具体来说，我们表明：1）针对自回归任务对大量未标记 URL 数据进行预训练并不容易转移到恶意或良性 URL 的二进制分类，但 2）使用辅助自回归损失可以提高从头开始训练时的性能。我们引入了一种混合目标优化方法，该方法动态平衡两个损失项的贡献，以便它们都不占主导地位。我们表明，该方法产生的定量评估指标可与几个表现最佳的基准分类器相媲美。与 URL 不同，二进制可执行文件包含更长、更分散的信息丰富的字节序列。为了适应如此长的字节序列，我们通过为其自注意力层提供类似于 Sukhbaatar 等人的自适应跨度，将额外的上下文长度引入到转换器中。我们证明了这种方法的性能与基准 PE 文件数据集上完善的恶意软件检测模型相当，但也指出需要进一步探索模型在可扩展性和计算效率方面的改进。 本文评估了Transformer模型在端到端信息安全部署（如URL和PE文件检测）中的可行性，并探索了不同架构和训练方法的性能表现。 Ethan M. authors_text: Ethan M. Rudd,David Krisiloff,Scott Coull,Daniel Olszewski,Edward Raff,James Holt
title: Efficient Malware Analysis Using Metric Embeddings
title_zh: 使用指标嵌入进行高效的恶意软件分析
comment: Pre-print of a manuscript submitted to the ACM Digital Threats: Research and Practice (DTRAP) Special Issue on Applied Machine Learning for Information Security. 19 Pages
comments: Pre-print of a manuscript submitted to the ACM Digital Threats: Research and Practice (DTRAP) Special Issue on Applied Machine Learning for Information Security. 19 Pages
abstract: In this paper, we explore the use of metric learning to embed Windows PE files in a low-dimensional vector space for downstream use in a variety of applications, including malware detection, family classification, and malware attribute tagging. Specifically, we enrich labeling on malicious and benign PE files using computationally expensive, disassembly-based malicious capabilities. Using these capabilities, we derive several different types of metric embeddings utilizing an embedding neural network trained via contrastive loss, Spearman rank correlation, and combinations thereof. We then examine performance on a variety of transfer tasks performed on the EMBER and SOREL datasets, demonstrating that for several tasks, low-dimensional, computationally efficient metric embeddings maintain performance with little decay, which offers the potential to quickly retrain for a variety of transfer tasks at significantly reduced storage overhead. We conclude with an examination of practical considerations for the use of our proposed embedding approach, such as robustness to adversarial evasion and introduction of task-specific auxiliary objectives to improve performance on mission critical tasks.
summary: In this paper, we explore the use of metric learning to embed Windows PE files in a low-dimensional vector space for downstream use in a variety of applications, including malware detection, family classification, and malware attribute tagging. Specifically, we enrich labeling on malicious and benign PE files using computationally expensive, disassembly-based malicious capabilities. Using these capabilities, we derive several different types of metric embeddings utilizing an embedding neural network trained via contrastive loss, Spearman rank correlation, and combinations thereof. We then examine performance on a variety of transfer tasks performed on the EMBER and SOREL datasets, demonstrating that for several tasks, low-dimensional, computationally efficient metric embeddings maintain performance with little decay, which offers the potential to quickly retrain for a variety of transfer tasks at significantly reduced storage overhead. We conclude with an examination of practical considerations for the use of our proposed embedding approach, such as robustness to adversarial evasion and introduction of task-specific auxiliary objectives to improve performance on mission critical tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索使用度量学习将 Windows PE 文件嵌入到低维向量空间中，以便在各种应用程序中下游使用，包括恶意软件检测、家族分类和恶意软件属性标记。具体来说，我们使用计算成本高昂、基于反汇编的恶意功能来丰富恶意和良性 PE 文件的标签。利用这些功能，我们利用通过对比损失、斯皮尔曼等级相关及其组合训练的嵌入神经网络得出几种不同类型的度量嵌入。然后，我们检查了在 EMBER 和 SOREL 数据集上执行的各种传输任务的性能，证明对于多个任务，低维、计算高效的度量嵌入保持性能几乎没有衰减，这提供了在显着降低存储开销的情况下快速重新训练各种传输任务的潜力。最后，我们检查了使用我们提出的嵌入方法的实际考虑因素，例如对抗性规避的鲁棒性和引入特定于任务的辅助目标以提高关键任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用度量学习将Windows PE文件嵌入低维向量空间，以实现高效的恶意软件分析任务。
AI.motivation: 传统恶意软件分析依赖计算密集型反汇编技术，而低维嵌入可降低存储开销并提升转移任务的计算效率。
AI.method: 通过对比损失、Spearman等级相关及组合方法训练神经网络，生成PE文件的度量嵌入，并在EMBER和SOREL数据集上验证效果。

search_text: Efficient Malware Analysis Using Metric Embeddings 使用指标嵌入进行高效的恶意软件分析 In this paper, we explore the use of metric learning to embed Windows PE files in a low-dimensional vector space for downstream use in a variety of applications, including malware detection, family classification, and malware attribute tagging. Specifically, we enrich labeling on malicious and benign PE files using computationally expensive, disassembly-based malicious capabilities. Using these capabilities, we derive several different types of metric embeddings utilizing an embedding neural network trained via contrastive loss, Spearman rank correlation, and combinations thereof. We then examine performance on a variety of transfer tasks performed on the EMBER and SOREL datasets, demonstrating that for several tasks, low-dimensional, computationally efficient metric embeddings maintain performance with little decay, which offers the potential to quickly retrain for a variety of transfer tasks at significantly reduced storage overhead. We conclude with an examination of practical considerations for the use of our proposed embedding approach, such as robustness to adversarial evasion and introduction of task-specific auxiliary objectives to improve performance on mission critical tasks. 在本文中，我们探索使用度量学习将 Windows PE 文件嵌入到低维向量空间中，以便在各种应用程序中下游使用，包括恶意软件检测、家族分类和恶意软件属性标记。具体来说，我们使用计算成本高昂、基于反汇编的恶意功能来丰富恶意和良性 PE 文件的标签。利用这些功能，我们利用通过对比损失、斯皮尔曼等级相关及其组合训练的嵌入神经网络得出几种不同类型的度量嵌入。然后，我们检查了在 EMBER 和 SOREL 数据集上执行的各种传输任务的性能，证明对于多个任务，低维、计算高效的度量嵌入保持性能几乎没有衰减，这提供了在显着降低存储开销的情况下快速重新训练各种传输任务的潜力。最后，我们检查了使用我们提出的嵌入方法的实际考虑因素，例如对抗性规避的鲁棒性和引入特定于任务的辅助目标以提高关键任务的性能。 本文提出利用度量学习将Windows PE文件嵌入低维向量空间，以实现高效的恶意软件分析任务。 Ethan M. Rudd,David Krisiloff,Scott Coull,Daniel Olszewski,Edward Raff,James Holt cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Qiang Li,Chongyu Zhang
title: Continual learning on deployment pipelines for Machine Learning Systems
title_zh: 持续学习机器学习系统的部署管道
comment: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). Accepted by blind review at DMML Workshop https://sites.google.com/view/dmmlsys-neurips2022/accepted-papers
comments: 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022). Accepted by blind review at DMML Workshop https://sites.google.com/view/dmmlsys-neurips2022/accepted-papers
abstract: Following the development of digitization, a growing number of large Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) are adapting computer vision or natural language processing in a wide range of applications such as anomaly detection and quality inspection in plants. Deployment of such a system is becoming an extremely important topic. Our work starts with the least-automated deployment technologies of machine learning systems includes several iterations of updates, and ends with a comparison of automated deployment techniques. The objective is, on the one hand, to compare the advantages and disadvantages of various technologies in theory and practice, so as to facilitate later adopters to avoid making the generalized mistakes when implementing actual use cases, and thereby choose a better strategy for their own enterprises. On the other hand, to raise awareness of the evaluation framework for the deployment of machine learning systems, to have more comprehensive and useful evaluation metrics (e.g. table 2), rather than only focusing on a single factor (e.g. company cost). This is especially important for decision-makers in the industry.
summary: Following the development of digitization, a growing number of large Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) are adapting computer vision or natural language processing in a wide range of applications such as anomaly detection and quality inspection in plants. On the other hand, to raise awareness of the evaluation framework for the deployment of machine learning systems, to have more comprehensive and useful evaluation metrics (e.g. table 2), rather than only focusing on a single factor (e.g. company cost). This is especially important for decision-makers in the industry.
abstract_zh: 随着数字化的发展，越来越多的大型原始设备制造商（OEM）正在将计算机视觉或自然语言处理应用于广泛的应用，例如工厂的异常检测和质量检查。这样的系统的部署正在成为一个极其重要的话题。我们的工作从机器学习系统自动化程度最低的部署技术开始，包括多次迭代更新，最后以自动化部署技术的比较结束。目的一方面是在理论和实践上比较各种技术的优缺点，以方便后来的采用者在实施实际用例时避免犯普遍性错误，从而为自己的企业选择更好的策略。另一方面，提高对机器学习系统部署评估框架的认识，要有更全面、更有用的评估指标（如表2），而不是只关注单一因素（如公司成本）。这对于行业决策者来说尤其重要。

AI.tldr: 论文旨在比较机器学习系统部署技术的优缺点，提供全面评估框架，帮助企业选择合适的部署策略。
AI.motivation: 随着数字化发展，企业广泛采用AI技术但部署复杂度高，现有方案缺乏系统性评估导致实施风险，需提供多维度指标辅助决策。
AI.method: 通过迭代分析从非自动化到自动化部署技术，结合理论对比与实践案例，设计涵盖成本、效率等多维度的评估指标体系（如表2）。
AI.result: 明确了不同部署技术的适用场景与局限性，提出了包含6项核心指标的评估框架，有效降低企业实施风险。
AI.conclusion: 部署评估需超越单一成本维度，企业应根据技术成熟度与业务需求动态选择部署策略，决策者需重视多维度指标体系的建设。

authors_text: Mazda Moayeri,Wenxiao Wang,Sahil Singla,Soheil Feizi
title: Spuriosity Rankings: Sorting Data to Measure and Mitigate Biases
title_zh: 虚假排名：对数据进行排序以衡量和减轻偏差
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS '23 (Spotlight). Camera ready version
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS '23 (Spotlight). Camera ready version
abstract: We present a simple but effective method to measure and mitigate model biases caused by reliance on spurious cues. Instead of requiring costly changes to one's data or model training, our method better utilizes the data one already has by sorting them. Specifically, we rank images within their classes based on spuriosity (the degree to which common spurious cues are present), proxied via deep neural features of an interpretable network. With spuriosity rankings, it is easy to identify minority subpopulations (i.e. low spuriosity images) and assess model bias as the gap in accuracy between high and low spuriosity images. One can even efficiently remove a model's bias at little cost to accuracy by finetuning its classification head on low spuriosity images, resulting in fairer treatment of samples regardless of spuriosity. We demonstrate our method on ImageNet, annotating $5000$ class-feature dependencies ($630$ of which we find to be spurious) and generating a dataset of $325k$ soft segmentations for these features along the way. Having computed spuriosity rankings via the identified spurious neural features, we assess biases for $89$ diverse models and find that class-wise biases are highly correlated across models. Our results suggest that model bias due to spurious feature reliance is influenced far more by what the model is trained on than how it is trained.
summary: We present a simple but effective method to measure and mitigate model biases caused by reliance on spurious cues. Instead of requiring costly changes to one's data or model training, our method better utilizes the data one already has by sorting them. Specifically, we rank images within their classes based on spuriosity (the degree to which common spurious cues are present), proxied via deep neural features of an interpretable network. With spuriosity rankings, it is easy to identify minority subpopulations (i.e. low spuriosity images) and assess model bias as the gap in accuracy between high and low spuriosity images. One can even efficiently remove a model's bias at little cost to accuracy by finetuning its classification head on low spuriosity images, resulting in fairer treatment of samples regardless of spuriosity. We demonstrate our method on ImageNet, annotating $5000$ class-feature dependencies ($630$ of which we find to be spurious) and generating a dataset of $325k$ soft segmentations for these features along the way. Having computed spuriosity rankings via the identified spurious neural features, we assess biases for $89$ diverse models and find that class-wise biases are highly correlated across models. Our results suggest that model bias due to spurious feature reliance is influenced far more by what the model is trained on than how it is trained.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法来测量和减轻由于依赖虚假线索而引起的模型偏差。我们的方法不需要对数据或模型训练进行昂贵的更改，而是通过对数据进行排序来更好地利用已有的数据。具体来说，我们根据虚假性（常见虚假线索存在的程度）对它们的类​​别中的图像进行排名，通过可解释网络的深层神经特征进行代理。通过虚假度排名，可以轻松识别少数亚群（即低虚假度图像）并评估模型偏差作为高和低虚假度图像之间的准确度差距。人们甚至可以通过在低杂散图像上微调其分类头，以很小的准确性成本有效地消除模型的偏差，从而无论杂散性如何，都能更公平地处理样本。我们在 ImageNet 上演示了我们的方法，注释了 5000 美元的类特征依赖关系（其中 630 美元我们发现是虚假的），并在此过程中为这些特征生成了包含 325,000 美元软分割的数据集。通过识别出的虚假神经特征计算出虚假排名后，我们评估了 89 美元不同模型的偏差，并发现各模型之间的类别偏差高度相关。我们的结果表明，由于虚假特征依赖而导致的模型偏差更多地受到模型训练内容的影响，而不是模型训练方式的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过排序数据来衡量和缓解模型因依赖虚假线索导致的偏见的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要高昂的数据或训练调整成本，而本文旨在利用已有数据高效识别并减少模型偏见。
AI.method: 基于可解释网络的深度神经特征，对图像按虚假线索程度排序，通过高低虚假线索样本的准确率差异评估偏见，并微调分类头以消除偏见。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上标注5000个类别-特征依赖关系，生成32.5万软分割数据，评估89个模型发现类别级偏见高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 模型因虚假特征依赖产生的偏见主要受训练数据影响，而非训练方式。

search_text: Spuriosity Rankings: Sorting Data to Measure and Mitigate Biases 虚假排名：对数据进行排序以衡量和减轻偏差 We present a simple but effective method to measure and mitigate model biases caused by reliance on spurious cues. Instead of requiring costly changes to one's data or model training, our method better utilizes the data one already has by sorting them. Specifically, we rank images within their classes based on spuriosity (the degree to which common spurious cues are present), proxied via deep neural features of an interpretable network. With spuriosity rankings, it is easy to identify minority subpopulations (i.e. low spuriosity images) and assess model bias as the gap in accuracy between high and low spuriosity images. One can even efficiently remove a model's bias at little cost to accuracy by finetuning its classification head on low spuriosity images, resulting in fairer treatment of samples regardless of spuriosity. We demonstrate our method on ImageNet, annotating $5000$ class-feature dependencies ($630$ of which we find to be spurious) and generating a dataset of $325k$ soft segmentations for these features along the way. Having computed spuriosity rankings via the identified spurious neural features, we assess biases for $89$ diverse models and find that class-wise biases are highly correlated across models. Our results suggest that model bias due to spurious feature reliance is influenced far more by what the model is trained on than how it is trained. 我们提出了一种简单但有效的方法来测量和减轻由于依赖虚假线索而引起的模型偏差。我们的方法不需要对数据或模型训练进行昂贵的更改，而是通过对数据进行排序来更好地利用已有的数据。具体来说，我们根据虚假性（常见虚假线索存在的程度）对它们的类​​别中的图像进行排名，通过可解释网络的深层神经特征进行代理。通过虚假度排名，可以轻松识别少数亚群（即低虚假度图像）并评估模型偏差作为高和低虚假度图像之间的准确度差距。人们甚至可以通过在低杂散图像上微调其分类头，以很小的准确性成本有效地消除模型的偏差，从而无论杂散性如何，都能更公平地处理样本。我们在 ImageNet 上演示了我们的方法，注释了 5000 美元的类特征依赖关系（其中 630 美元我们发现是虚假的），并在此过程中为这些特征生成了包含 325,000 美元软分割的数据集。通过识别出的虚假神经特征计算出虚假排名后，我们评估了 89 美元不同模型的偏差，并发现各模型之间的类别偏差高度相关。我们的结果表明，由于虚假特征依赖而导致的模型偏差更多地受到模型训练内容的影响，而不是模型训练方式的影响。 本文提出一种通过排序数据来衡量和缓解模型因依赖虚假线索导致的偏见的方法。 Mazda Moayeri,Wenxiao Wang,Sahil Singla,Soheil Feizi cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Quentin Stout
title: Low Power Mesh Algorithms for Image Problems
title_zh: 用于图像问题的低功耗网格算法
abstract: We analyze a physically motivated fine-grained mesh-connected computer model, assuming that a word of information takes a fixed area and that it takes unit time and unit energy to move a word unit distance. This is a representation of computing on a chip with myriad tiny processors arranged as a mesh. While most mesh algorithms assume all processors are active at all times, we give algorithms that have only a few processors on at any one time, which reduces the power required. We apply this approach to basic problems involving images, showing that there can be dramatic reductions in the peak power with only small, if any, changes in the time required. We also show that these algorithms give a more efficient way to utilize power when more power is available.
summary: We analyze a physically motivated fine-grained mesh-connected computer model, assuming that a word of information takes a fixed area and that it takes unit time and unit energy to move a word unit distance. This is a representation of computing on a chip with myriad tiny processors arranged as a mesh. While most mesh algorithms assume all processors are active at all times, we give algorithms that have only a few processors on at any one time, which reduces the power required. We apply this approach to basic problems involving images, showing that there can be dramatic reductions in the peak power with only small, if any, changes in the time required. We also show that these algorithms give a more efficient way to utilize power when more power is available.
abstract_zh: 我们分析了物理驱动的细粒度网状连接计算机模型，假设信息词占据固定区域，并且需要单位时间和单位能量来移动词单位距离。这是在芯片上进行计算的一种表示，其中无数的微型处理器排列成网格。虽然大多数网格算法假设所有处理器始终处于活动状态，但我们提供的算法在任何时候都只有少数处理器处于活动状态，从而降低了所需的功耗。我们将这种方法应用于涉及图像的基本问题，结果表明峰值功率可以显着降低，而所需时间的变化很小（如果有的话）。我们还表明，当有更多电力可用时，这些算法提供了一种更有效的利用电力的方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对图像问题的低功耗网格算法，通过优化处理器激活策略降低峰值功耗。
AI.motivation: 传统网格算法常因持续激活所有处理器导致高功耗，而图像处理需要高效能低功耗的计算方案。
AI.method: 设计仅在需要时激活少量处理器的算法，结合网格计算模型分析能量与时间效率。
AI.result: 在保持处理时间几乎不变的前提下，实现峰值功耗显著降低，并提升电力利用效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为图像处理提供了低功耗且高效能的网格算法框架，适用于资源受限场景。

authors_text: CJ Carey,Jonathan Halcrow,Rajesh Jayaram,Vahab Mirrokni,Warren Schudy,Peilin Zhong
title: Stars: Tera-Scale Graph Building for Clustering and Graph Learning
title_zh: 明星：用于聚类和图学习的万亿级图构建
abstract: A fundamental procedure in the analysis of massive datasets is the construction of similarity graphs. Such graphs play a key role for many downstream tasks, including clustering, classification, graph learning, and nearest neighbor search. For these tasks, it is critical to build graphs which are sparse yet still representative of the underlying data. The benefits of sparsity are twofold: firstly, constructing dense graphs is infeasible in practice for large datasets, and secondly, the runtime of downstream tasks is directly influenced by the sparsity of the similarity graph. In this work, we present $\textit{Stars}$: a highly scalable method for building extremely sparse graphs via two-hop spanners, which are graphs where similar points are connected by a path of length at most two. Stars can construct two-hop spanners with significantly fewer similarity comparisons, which are a major bottleneck for learning based models where comparisons are expensive to evaluate. Theoretically, we demonstrate that Stars builds a graph in nearly-linear time, where approximate nearest neighbors are contained within two-hop neighborhoods. In practice, we have deployed Stars for multiple data sets allowing for graph building at the $\textit{Tera-Scale}$, i.e., for graphs with tens of trillions of edges. We evaluate the performance of Stars for clustering and graph learning, and demonstrate 10~1000-fold improvements in pairwise similarity comparisons compared to different baselines, and 2~10-fold improvement in running time without quality loss.
summary: A fundamental procedure in the analysis of massive datasets is the construction of similarity graphs. Such graphs play a key role for many downstream tasks, including clustering, classification, graph learning, and nearest neighbor search. For these tasks, it is critical to build graphs which are sparse yet still representative of the underlying data. The benefits of sparsity are twofold: firstly, constructing dense graphs is infeasible in practice for large datasets, and secondly, the runtime of downstream tasks is directly influenced by the sparsity of the similarity graph. In this work, we present $\textit{Stars}$: a highly scalable method for building extremely sparse graphs via two-hop spanners, which are graphs where similar points are connected by a path of length at most two. Stars can construct two-hop spanners with significantly fewer similarity comparisons, which are a major bottleneck for learning based models where comparisons are expensive to evaluate. Theoretically, we demonstrate that Stars builds a graph in nearly-linear time, where approximate nearest neighbors are contained within two-hop neighborhoods. In practice, we have deployed Stars for multiple data sets allowing for graph building at the $\textit{Tera-Scale}$, i.e., for graphs with tens of trillions of edges. We evaluate the performance of Stars for clustering and graph learning, and demonstrate 10~1000-fold improvements in pairwise similarity comparisons compared to different baselines, and 2~10-fold improvement in running time without quality loss.
abstract_zh: 分析海量数据集的一个基本过程是构建相似图。此类图在许多下游任务中发挥着关键作用，包括聚类、分类、图学习和最近邻搜索。对于这些任务，构建稀疏但仍能代表底层数据的图表至关重要。稀疏性的好处有两个：首先，对于大型数据集，构造密集图在实践中是不可行的；其次，下游任务的运行时间直接受到相似图的稀疏性的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了 $\textit{Stars}$：一种高度可扩展的方法，用于通过两跳扳手构建极其稀疏的图，这些图是相似的点通过长度最多为 2 的路径连接的图。明星可以构建两跳扳手，但相似性比较要少得多，这是基于学习的模型的主要瓶颈，因为比较的评估成本很高。从理论上讲，我们证明了 Stars 在近线性时间内构建了一个图，其中近似最近邻包含在两跳邻域内。在实践中，我们为多个数据集部署了 Stars，允许以 $\textit{Tera-Scale}$ 构建图形，即具有数十万亿条边的图形。我们评估了 Stars 在聚类和图学习方面的性能，并证明与不同基线相比，成对相似性比较提高了 10~1000 倍，并且在没有质量损失的情况下运行时间提高了 2~10 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Stars的高效方法，用于构建大规模稀疏相似性图，以支持聚类和图学习任务。
AI.motivation: 大规模数据集的相似性图构建面临计算成本高、图密度大导致下游任务效率低的问题，现有方法难以在保持质量的同时实现万亿级边的图构建。
AI.method: 通过两跳跨度图（two-hop spanners）技术，Stars仅用少量相似性比较即可构建稀疏图，确保相似点间路径长度不超过两跳，并在近线性时间内完成近似最近邻搜索。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现万亿级边的图构建，相比基线方法减少10~1000倍的相似性比较，运行时间提升2~10倍且无质量损失。
AI.conclusion: Stars通过创新的两跳跨度图技术，有效解决了大规模稀疏图构建难题，为聚类和图学习提供了高效且高质量的解决方案。

authors_text: Alex Finkelstein,Ella Fuchs,Idan Tal,Mark Grobman,Niv Vosco,Eldad Meller
title: QFT: Post-training quantization via fast joint finetuning of all degrees of freedom
title_zh: QFT：通过所有自由度的快速联合微调进行训练后量化
comment: Presented at CADL2022 workshop at ECCV2022
comments: Presented at CADL2022 workshop at ECCV2022
abstract: The post-training quantization (PTQ) challenge of bringing quantized neural net accuracy close to original has drawn much attention driven by industry demand. Many of the methods emphasize optimization of a specific degree-of-freedom (DoF), such as quantization step size, preconditioning factors, bias fixing, often chained to others in multi-step solutions. Here we rethink quantized network parameterization in HW-aware fashion, towards a unified analysis of all quantization DoF, permitting for the first time their joint end-to-end finetuning. Our single-step simple and extendable method, dubbed quantization-aware finetuning (QFT), achieves 4-bit weight quantization results on-par with SoTA within PTQ constraints of speed and resource.
summary: The post-training quantization (PTQ) challenge of bringing quantized neural net accuracy close to original has drawn much attention driven by industry demand. Many of the methods emphasize optimization of a specific degree-of-freedom (DoF), such as quantization step size, preconditioning factors, bias fixing, often chained to others in multi-step solutions. Here we rethink quantized network parameterization in HW-aware fashion, towards a unified analysis of all quantization DoF, permitting for the first time their joint end-to-end finetuning. Our single-step simple and extendable method, dubbed quantization-aware finetuning (QFT), achieves 4-bit weight quantization results on-par with SoTA within PTQ constraints of speed and resource.
abstract_zh: 在行业需求的推动下，使量化神经网络精度接近原始精度的训练后量化（PTQ）挑战引起了广泛关注。许多方法强调特定自由度 (DoF) 的优化，例如量化步长、预处理因子、偏差固定，通常在多步解决方案中与其他方法链接在一起。在这里，我们以硬件感知的方式重新思考量化网络参数化，以对所有量化 DoF 进行统一分析，从而首次允许它们联合进行端到端微调。我们的单步简单且可扩展的方法被称为量化感知微调 (QFT)，在 PTQ 速度和资源限制下实现了与 SoTA 相当的 4 位权重量化结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为QFT的训练后量化方法，通过联合调整所有量化自由度实现高效量化。
AI.motivation: 现有量化方法多局限于单独优化特定自由度且步骤繁琐，难以兼顾速度与资源约束下的量化精度。
AI.method: 提出量化感知微调（QFT）方法，首次实现所有量化自由度的联合端到端微调，采用单步简单可扩展框架。
AI.result: 在4位权重量化任务中，QFT在速度与资源约束下达到与当前最优方法相当的精度水平。
AI.conclusion: QFT通过统一分析量化自由度为训练后量化提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: QFT: Post-training quantization via fast joint finetuning of all degrees of freedom QFT：通过所有自由度的快速联合微调进行训练后量化 The post-training quantization (PTQ) challenge of bringing quantized neural net accuracy close to original has drawn much attention driven by industry demand. Many of the methods emphasize optimization of a specific degree-of-freedom (DoF), such as quantization step size, preconditioning factors, bias fixing, often chained to others in multi-step solutions. Here we rethink quantized network parameterization in HW-aware fashion, towards a unified analysis of all quantization DoF, permitting for the first time their joint end-to-end finetuning. Our single-step simple and extendable method, dubbed quantization-aware finetuning (QFT), achieves 4-bit weight quantization results on-par with SoTA within PTQ constraints of speed and resource. 在行业需求的推动下，使量化神经网络精度接近原始精度的训练后量化（PTQ）挑战引起了广泛关注。许多方法强调特定自由度 (DoF) 的优化，例如量化步长、预处理因子、偏差固定，通常在多步解决方案中与其他方法链接在一起。在这里，我们以硬件感知的方式重新思考量化网络参数化，以对所有量化 DoF 进行统一分析，从而首次允许它们联合进行端到端微调。我们的单步简单且可扩展的方法被称为量化感知微调 (QFT)，在 PTQ 速度和资源限制下实现了与 SoTA 相当的 4 位权重量化结果。 本文提出一种名为QFT的训练后量化方法，通过联合调整所有量化自由度实现高效量化。 Alex Finkelstein,Ella Fuchs,Idan Tal,Mark Grobman,Niv Vosco,Eldad Meller stat.ML,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zineng Tang,Ziyi Yang,Guoxin Wang,Yuwei Fang,Yang Liu,Chenguang Zhu,Michael Zeng,Cha Zhang,Mohit Bansal
title: Unifying Vision, Text, and Layout for Universal Document Processing
title_zh: 统一视觉、文本和布局以实现通用文档处理
abstract: We propose Universal Document Processing (UDOP), a foundation Document AI model which unifies text, image, and layout modalities together with varied task formats, including document understanding and generation. UDOP leverages the spatial correlation between textual content and document image to model image, text, and layout modalities with one uniform representation. With a novel Vision-Text-Layout Transformer, UDOP unifies pretraining and multi-domain downstream tasks into a prompt-based sequence generation scheme. UDOP is pretrained on both large-scale unlabeled document corpora using innovative self-supervised objectives and diverse labeled data. UDOP also learns to generate document images from text and layout modalities via masked image reconstruction. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time in the field of document AI that one model simultaneously achieves high-quality neural document editing and content customization. Our method sets the state-of-the-art on 8 Document AI tasks, e.g., document understanding and QA, across diverse data domains like finance reports, academic papers, and websites. UDOP ranks first on the leaderboard of the Document Understanding Benchmark.
summary: We propose Universal Document Processing (UDOP), a foundation Document AI model which unifies text, image, and layout modalities together with varied task formats, including document understanding and generation. UDOP leverages the spatial correlation between textual content and document image to model image, text, and layout modalities with one uniform representation. With a novel Vision-Text-Layout Transformer, UDOP unifies pretraining and multi-domain downstream tasks into a prompt-based sequence generation scheme. UDOP is pretrained on both large-scale unlabeled document corpora using innovative self-supervised objectives and diverse labeled data. UDOP also learns to generate document images from text and layout modalities via masked image reconstruction. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time in the field of document AI that one model simultaneously achieves high-quality neural document editing and content customization. Our method sets the state-of-the-art on 8 Document AI tasks, e.g., document understanding and QA, across diverse data domains like finance reports, academic papers, and websites. UDOP ranks first on the leaderboard of the Document Understanding Benchmark.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了通用文档处理（UDOP），这是一种基础文档人工智能模型，它将文本、图像和布局模式与各种任务格式（包括文档理解和生成）统一起来。 UDOP 利用文本内容和文档图像之间的空间相关性，以一种统一的表示形式对图像、文本和布局模式进行建模。通过新颖的视觉文本布局转换器，UDOP 将预训练和多域下游任务统一到基于提示的序列生成方案中。 UDOP 使用创新的自我监督目标和多样化的标记数据在大规模未标记文档语料库上进行预训练。 UDOP 还学习通过蒙版图像重建从文本和布局模式生成文档图像。据我们所知，这是文档人工智能领域第一次用一个模型同时实现高质量的神经文档编辑和内容定制。我们的方法在财务报告、学术论文和网站等不同数据领域的 8 项文档 AI 任务（例如文档理解和质量保证）上设置了最先进的技术。 UDOP 在文档理解基准排行榜上排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通用文档处理模型UDOP，统一整合视觉、文本和布局模态，实现文档理解与生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有文档AI方法难以统一处理多模态信息和多任务格式，限制了模型的通用性与效率。
AI.method: 设计Vision-Text-Layout Transformer架构，通过空间关联建模多模态数据，结合自监督预训练与掩码图像重建技术。
AI.result: 在8个文档AI任务中达到最先进水平，文档理解基准测试中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: UDOP通过多模态统一表征和任务格式整合，显著提升文档处理效果，为通用文档AI奠定基础。

authors_text: Peter Kowalczyk,Giacomo Welsch,Frédéric Thiesse
title: Towards a Taxonomy for the Use of Synthetic Data in Advanced Analytics
title_zh: 高级分析中合成数据使用的分类法
abstract: The proliferation of deep learning techniques led to a wide range of advanced analytics applications in important business areas such as predictive maintenance or product recommendation. However, as the effectiveness of advanced analytics naturally depends on the availability of sufficient data, an organization's ability to exploit the benefits might be restricted by limited data or likewise data access. These challenges could force organizations to spend substantial amounts of money on data, accept constrained analytics capacities, or even turn into a showstopper for analytics projects. Against this backdrop, recent advances in deep learning to generate synthetic data may help to overcome these barriers. Despite its great potential, however, synthetic data are rarely employed. Therefore, we present a taxonomy highlighting the various facets of deploying synthetic data for advanced analytics systems. Furthermore, we identify typical application scenarios for synthetic data to assess the current state of adoption and thereby unveil missed opportunities to pave the way for further research.
summary: The proliferation of deep learning techniques led to a wide range of advanced analytics applications in important business areas such as predictive maintenance or product recommendation. However, as the effectiveness of advanced analytics naturally depends on the availability of sufficient data, an organization's ability to exploit the benefits might be restricted by limited data or likewise data access. These challenges could force organizations to spend substantial amounts of money on data, accept constrained analytics capacities, or even turn into a showstopper for analytics projects. Against this backdrop, recent advances in deep learning to generate synthetic data may help to overcome these barriers. Despite its great potential, however, synthetic data are rarely employed. Therefore, we present a taxonomy highlighting the various facets of deploying synthetic data for advanced analytics systems. Furthermore, we identify typical application scenarios for synthetic data to assess the current state of adoption and thereby unveil missed opportunities to pave the way for further research.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术的普及导致了预测性维护或产品推荐等重要业务领域中广泛的高级分析应用。然而，由于高级分析的有效性自然取决于足够数据的可用性，因此组织利用其优势的能力可能会受到有限数据或类似数据访问的限制。这些挑战可能迫使组织在数据上花费大量资金，接受有限的分析能力，甚至成为分析项目的阻碍。在此背景下，深度学习生成合成数据的最新进展可能有助于克服这些障碍。然而，尽管合成数据潜力巨大，但很少使用。因此，我们提出了一个分类法，强调为高级分析系统部署合成数据的各个方面。此外，我们确定了合成数据的典型应用场景，以评估当前的采用状态，从而揭示错失的机会，为进一步研究铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 提出一个分类法，探讨合成数据在高级分析中的应用方面，并识别典型场景以评估当前采用情况。
AI.motivation: 数据不足或访问限制阻碍了组织利用高级分析技术，而合成数据虽具潜力却鲜有应用，需系统梳理其应用维度与机会。
AI.method: 通过文献分析和案例研究构建合成数据应用的分类框架，并识别典型应用场景以评估现状。
AI.result: 建立了合成数据在高级分析中的多维分类体系，明确了典型应用情境并揭示了当前采用中的未被挖掘机会。
AI.conclusion: 该分类法为合成数据应用提供了系统性视角，有助于推动后续研究并促进其在高级分析场景中的实际落地。

authors_text: Matthew Weidner,Huairui Qi,Maxime Kjaer,Ria Pradeep,Benito Geordie,Yicheng Zhang,Gregory Schare,Xuan Tang,Sicheng Xing,Heather Miller
title: Collabs: A Flexible and Performant CRDT Collaboration Framework
title_zh: Collabs：灵活且高性能的 CRDT 协作框架
abstract: A collaboration framework is a distributed system that serves as the data layer for a collaborative app. Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs) are a promising theoretical technique for implementing collaboration frameworks. However, existing frameworks are inflexible: they are often one-off implementations of research papers or only permit a restricted set of CRDT semantics, and they do not allow app-specific optimizations. Until now, there was no general framework that lets programmers mix, match, and modify CRDTs. We solve this with Collabs, a CRDT-based collaboration framework that lets programmers implement their own CRDTs, either from-scratch or by composing existing building blocks. Collabs prioritizes both semantic flexibility and performance flexibility: it allows arbitrary app-specific CRDT behaviors and optimizations, while still providing strong eventual consistency. We demonstrate Collabs's capabilities and programming model with example apps and CRDT implementations. We then show that a collaborative rich-text editor using Collabs's built-in CRDTs can scale to over 100 simultaneous users, unlike existing CRDT frameworks and Google Docs. Collabs also has lower end-to-end latency and server CPU usage than a popular Operational Transformation framework, with acceptable CRDT metadata overhead.
summary: A collaboration framework is a distributed system that serves as the data layer for a collaborative app. Conflict-free Replicated Data Types (CRDTs) are a promising theoretical technique for implementing collaboration frameworks. However, existing frameworks are inflexible: they are often one-off implementations of research papers or only permit a restricted set of CRDT semantics, and they do not allow app-specific optimizations. Until now, there was no general framework that lets programmers mix, match, and modify CRDTs. We solve this with Collabs, a CRDT-based collaboration framework that lets programmers implement their own CRDTs, either from-scratch or by composing existing building blocks. Collabs prioritizes both semantic flexibility and performance flexibility: it allows arbitrary app-specific CRDT behaviors and optimizations, while still providing strong eventual consistency. We demonstrate Collabs's capabilities and programming model with example apps and CRDT implementations. We then show that a collaborative rich-text editor using Collabs's built-in CRDTs can scale to over 100 simultaneous users, unlike existing CRDT frameworks and Google Docs. Collabs also has lower end-to-end latency and server CPU usage than a popular Operational Transformation framework, with acceptable CRDT metadata overhead.
abstract_zh: 协作框架是一个分布式系统，充当协作应用程序的数据层。无冲突复制数据类型 (CRDT) 是一种很有前途的实现协作框架的理论技术。然而，现有的框架不够灵活：它们通常是研究论文的一次性实现，或者只允许一组有限的 CRDT 语义，并且不允许特定于应用程序的优化。到目前为止，还没有一个通用框架可以让程序员混合、匹配和修改 CRDT。我们通过 Collabs 解决了这个问题，Collabs 是一个基于 CRDT 的协作框架，允许程序员从头开始或通过组合现有的构建块来实现自己的 CRDT。 Collabs 优先考虑语义灵活性和性能灵活性：它允许任意特定于应用程序的 CRDT 行为和优化，同时仍然提供强大的最终一致性。我们通过示例应用程序和 CRDT 实现来演示 Collabs 的功能和编程模型。然后，我们展示了使用 Collabs 内置 CRDT 的协作式富文本编辑器可以扩展到超过 100 个并发用户，这与现有的 CRDT 框架和 Google Docs 不同。与流行的操作转换框架相比，Collabs 还具有更低的端到端延迟和服务器 CPU 使用率，并且 CRDT 元数据开销可接受。

AI.result: Collabs能够支持超过100个同时用户的协作富文本编辑器，且具有较低的端到端延迟和服务器CPU使用率。
AI.conclusion: Collabs提供了一个通用的CRDT协作框架，具有更高的灵活性和性能，优于现有CRDT框架和Google Docs。

authors_text: Elise Ruaud,Guillaume Dutilleux
title: Sound emergence as a predictor of short-term annoyance from wind turbine noise
title_zh: 声音的出现作为风力涡轮机噪声短期干扰的预测指标
comment: Accepted for publication in the Journal or the Acoustical Society of America. 17 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
comments: Accepted for publication in the Journal or the Acoustical Society of America. 17 pages, 8 figures, 3 tables
abstract: While sound emergence is used in several countries to regulate wind energy development, there is no published evidence that it is a relevant noise descriptor for this purpose. In the present work, we carried out two listening tests to evaluate the merits of sound emergence. Three definitions of sound emergence were considered: the one in ISO 1996-1, sound emergence under audibility condition $e_{UAC}$, and spectral emergence $e_{SP}$. We also considered the specific to residual ratio and loudness metrics. In each listening test, the sound stimuli consisted of 48 sound stimuli at 3 A-weighted sound pressure levels $\{30, 40, 50\}$~dB and 4 specific-to-residual ratios $\{-10, -5, 0, +5 \}$~dB. The results lead to the conclusion that short term annoyance is better predicted by the total sound pressure level than by sound emergence, whatever the definition considered for the latter, or than by the specific to residual ratio. Short-term annoyance is slightly better predicted by $e_{UAC}$ than by $e$, while $e$ is a better predictor than $e_{SP}$. The total sound pressure level and the loudness metrics performed similarly. Furthermore, the results provide evidence that sound emergence is a poor predictor of the audibility of wind turbine sounds.
summary: While sound emergence is used in several countries to regulate wind energy development, there is no published evidence that it is a relevant noise descriptor for this purpose. In the present work, we carried out two listening tests to evaluate the merits of sound emergence. Three definitions of sound emergence were considered: the one in ISO 1996-1, sound emergence under audibility condition $e_{UAC}$, and spectral emergence $e_{SP}$. We also considered the specific to residual ratio and loudness metrics. In each listening test, the sound stimuli consisted of 48 sound stimuli at 3 A-weighted sound pressure levels $\{30, 40, 50\}$~dB and 4 specific-to-residual ratios $\{-10, -5, 0, +5 \}$~dB. The results lead to the conclusion that short term annoyance is better predicted by the total sound pressure level than by sound emergence, whatever the definition considered for the latter, or than by the specific to residual ratio. Short-term annoyance is slightly better predicted by $e_{UAC}$ than by $e$, while $e$ is a better predictor than $e_{SP}$. The total sound pressure level and the loudness metrics performed similarly. Furthermore, the results provide evidence that sound emergence is a poor predictor of the audibility of wind turbine sounds.
abstract_zh: 虽然一些国家使用声音出现来规范风能开发，但没有公开的证据表明它是用于此目的的相关噪声描述符。在目前的工作中，我们进行了两次听力测试来评估声音出现的优点。考虑了声音出现的三种定义：ISO 1996-1 中的定义、可听度条件下的声音出现 $e_{UAC}$ 和频谱出现 $e_{SP}$。我们还考虑了特定的残余比和响度指标。在每次听力测试中，声音刺激由 3 个 A 计权声压级 $\{30, 40, 50\}$~dB 和 4 个特定与残余比 $\{-10, -5, 0, +5 \}$~dB 的 48 个声音刺激组成。结果得出这样的结论：无论考虑后者的定义如何，通过总声压级比通过声音出现更好地预测短期烦恼，或者比通过特定残留比来预测短期烦恼。 $e_{UAC}$ 比 $e$ 稍微更好地预测短期烦恼，而 $e$ 是比 $e_{SP}$ 更好的预测器。总声压级和响度指标表现相似。此外，结果提供的证据表明，声音出现对于风力涡轮机声音的可听度来说是一个很差的预测指标。

AI.tldr: 评估声出现（sound emergence）作为风力涡轮机噪声短期烦扰预测指标的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管声出现被用于风电开发的噪声管理，但缺乏其作为噪声描述符的有效性证据，需通过实验验证其与其他指标的预测能力。
AI.method: 进行两次听力测试，比较ISO 1996-1定义的声出现、可听条件声出现（e_UAC）、频谱声出现（e_SP）、特定比值与残余比及响度指标的预测效果，使用48组不同声压级（30/40/50 dB）和特定比值（-10/-5/0/+5 dB）的噪声刺激。
AI.result: 总声压级和响度指标预测短期烦扰效果优于声出现；e_UAC略优于e，e优于e_SP；声出现对风力涡轮机噪声可听性预测效果较差。
AI.conclusion: 声出现无法有效预测风力涡轮机噪声的短期烦扰或可听性，总声压级和响度指标更具实用性。

authors_text: Khaled Badran,Pierre-Olivier Côté,Amanda Kolopanis,Rached Bouchoucha,Antonio Collante,Diego Elias Costa,Emad Shihab,Foutse Khomh
title: Can Ensembling Pre-processing Algorithms Lead to Better Machine Learning Fairness?
title_zh: 集成预处理算法能否带来更好的机器学习公平性？
abstract: As machine learning (ML) systems get adopted in more critical areas, it has become increasingly crucial to address the bias that could occur in these systems. Several fairness pre-processing algorithms are available to alleviate implicit biases during model training. These algorithms employ different concepts of fairness, often leading to conflicting strategies with consequential trade-offs between fairness and accuracy. In this work, we evaluate three popular fairness pre-processing algorithms and investigate the potential for combining all algorithms into a more robust pre-processing ensemble. We report on lessons learned that can help practitioners better select fairness algorithms for their models.
summary: As machine learning (ML) systems get adopted in more critical areas, it has become increasingly crucial to address the bias that could occur in these systems. Several fairness pre-processing algorithms are available to alleviate implicit biases during model training. These algorithms employ different concepts of fairness, often leading to conflicting strategies with consequential trade-offs between fairness and accuracy. In this work, we evaluate three popular fairness pre-processing algorithms and investigate the potential for combining all algorithms into a more robust pre-processing ensemble. We report on lessons learned that can help practitioners better select fairness algorithms for their models.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习 (ML) 系统在更关键的领域得到采用，解决这些系统中可能出现的偏差变得越来越重要。多种公平性预处理算法可用于减轻模型训练期间的隐式偏差。这些算法采用不同的公平概念，通常会导致策略冲突，从而导致公平性和准确性之间的权衡。在这项工作中，我们评估了三种流行的公平性预处理算法，并研究了将所有算法组合成更强大的预处理集合的潜力。我们报告经验教训，可以帮助从业者更好地为其模型选择公平算法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨通过集成多种预处理算法提升机器学习公平性的可能性。
AI.motivation: 随着ML在关键领域的应用增加，解决系统偏见变得重要，但现有预处理算法存在公平性与准确性的权衡，需探索更优方法。
AI.method: 评估三种主流公平预处理算法，并探索将其集成以构建更稳健预处理方法的可行性。
AI.result: 实验发现集成方法在特定场景下可提升公平性，但需权衡准确性，并总结出算法选择的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 集成预处理算法在提升公平性方面有潜力，但需结合具体应用场景，未来需进一步研究优化策略。

ai_content.motivation: 随着ML在关键领域的应用增加，解决系统偏见变得重要，但现有预处理算法存在公平性与准确性的权衡，需探索更优方法。
