search_text: Can Ensembling Pre-processing Algorithms Lead to Better Machine Learning Fairness? 集成预处理算法能否带来更好的机器学习公平性？ As machine learning (ML) systems get adopted in more critical areas, it has become increasingly crucial to address the bias that could occur in these systems. Several fairness pre-processing algorithms are available to alleviate implicit biases during model training. These algorithms employ different concepts of fairness, often leading to conflicting strategies with consequential trade-offs between fairness and accuracy. In this work, we evaluate three popular fairness pre-processing algorithms and investigate the potential for combining all algorithms into a more robust pre-processing ensemble. We report on lessons learned that can help practitioners better select fairness algorithms for their models. 随着机器学习 (ML) 系统在更关键的领域得到采用，解决这些系统中可能出现的偏差变得越来越重要。多种公平性预处理算法可用于减轻模型训练期间的隐式偏差。这些算法采用不同的公平概念，通常会导致策略冲突，从而导致公平性和准确性之间的权衡。在这项工作中，我们评估了三种流行的公平性预处理算法，并研究了将所有算法组合成更强大的预处理集合的潜力。我们报告经验教训，可以帮助从业者更好地为其模型选择公平算法。 本文探讨通过集成多种预处理算法提升机器学习公平性的可能性。 Khaled Badran,Pierre-Olivier Côté,Amanda Kolopanis,Rached Bouchoucha,Antonio Collante,Diego Elias Costa,Emad Shihab,Foutse Khomh cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Seyyed Mohammad Sadegh Moosavi Khorzooghi,Shirin Nilizadeh
title: StyleGAN as a Utility-Preserving Face De-identification Method
title_zh: StyleGAN 作为一种保留实用性的人脸去识别方法
abstract: Face de-identification methods have been proposed to preserve users' privacy by obscuring their faces. These methods, however, can degrade the quality of photos, and they usually do not preserve the utility of faces, i.e., their age, gender, pose, and facial expression. Recently, GANs, such as StyleGAN, have been proposed, which generate realistic, high-quality imaginary faces. In this paper, we investigate the use of StyleGAN in generating de-identified faces through style mixing. We examined this de-identification method for preserving utility and privacy by implementing several face detection, verification, and identification attacks and conducting a user study. The results from our extensive experiments, human evaluation, and comparison with two state-of-the-art methods, i.e., CIAGAN and DeepPrivacy, show that StyleGAN performs on par or better than these methods, preserving users' privacy and images' utility. In particular, the results of the machine learning-based experiments show that StyleGAN0-4 preserves utility better than CIAGAN and DeepPrivacy while preserving privacy at the same level. StyleGAN0-3 preserves utility at the same level while providing more privacy. In this paper, for the first time, we also performed a carefully designed user study to examine both privacy and utility-preserving properties of StyleGAN0-3, 0-4, and 0-5, as well as CIAGAN and DeepPrivacy from the human observers' perspectives. Our statistical tests showed that participants tend to verify and identify StyleGAN0-5 images more easily than DeepPrivacy images. All the methods but StyleGAN0-5 had significantly lower identification rates than CIAGAN. Regarding utility, as expected, StyleGAN0-5 performed significantly better in preserving some attributes. Among all methods, on average, participants believe gender has been preserved the most while naturalness has been preserved the least.

StyleGAN0-3 preserves utility at the same level while providing more privacy. In this paper, for the first time, we also performed a carefully designed user study to examine both privacy and utility-preserving properties of StyleGAN0-3, 0-4, and 0-5, as well as CIAGAN and DeepPrivacy from the human observers' perspectives. abstract_zh: 人们提出了面部去识别方法，通过模糊面部来保护用户的隐私。然而，这些方法会降低照片的质量，并且通常不能保留面部的实用性，即年龄、性别、姿势和面部表情。最近，GAN（例如 StyleGAN）被提出，它可以生成真实、高质量的假想面孔。在本文中，我们研究了 StyleGAN 通过风格混合生成去识别化面孔的用途。我们通过实施多次人脸检测、验证和识别攻击并进行用户研究，研究了这种去识别方法，以保护实用性和隐私。我们广泛的实验、人类评估以及与两种最先进的方法（即 CIAGAN 和 DeepPrivacy）的比较的结果表明，StyleGAN 的性能与这些方法相当或更好，保护了用户的隐私和图像的实用性。特别是，基于机器学习的实验结果表明，StyleGAN0-4 在保护隐私的同时，比 CIAGAN 和 DeepPrivacy 更好地保留了实用性。 StyleGAN0-3 在提供更多隐私的同时保留了相同水平的实用性。在本文中，我们还首次进行了精心设计的用户研究，从人类观察者的角度检查 StyleGAN0-3、0-4 和 0-5 以及 CIAGAN 和 DeepPrivacy 的隐私和效用保护特性。我们的统计测试表明，参与者倾向于比 DeepPrivacy 图像更容易验证和识别 StyleGAN0-5 图像。除StyleGAN0-5外，所有方法的识别率均显着低于CIAGAN。就实用性而言，正如预期的那样，StyleGAN0-5 在保留某些属性方面表现明显更好。在所有方法中，平均而言，参与者认为性别保留得最多，而自然性保留得最少。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨使用StyleGAN通过风格混合生成去标识化人脸，在保护隐私的同时保留面部图像的实用性（如年龄、性别等属性）。
AI.motivation: 传统人脸去标识化方法常导致图像质量下降且无法有效保留面部属性，而StyleGAN等生成对抗网络能生成高质量人脸，可能兼顾隐私与实用性。
AI.method: 基于StyleGAN的风格混合技术生成去标识化人脸，并通过机器学习攻击测试、用户研究及与CIAGAN、DeepPrivacy等方法的对比验证隐私与实用性保留效果。
AI.result: StyleGAN0-4在保留实用性方面优于CIAGAN和DeepPrivacy，StyleGAN0-3在隐私性上更优；用户研究显示StyleGAN0-5在属性保留（如性别）和自然度上表现最佳，但识别率低于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: StyleGAN能有效平衡隐私保护与图像实用性，其中不同变体（如0-3、0-4、0-5）在特定指标上各有优势，为实用场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nicolas Jonason,Bob L. T. Sturm
title: Audio Latent Space Cartography
title_zh: 音频潜在空间制图
abstract: We explore the generation of visualisations of audio latent spaces using an audio-to-image generation pipeline. We believe this can help with the interpretability of audio latent spaces. We demonstrate a variety of results on the NSynth dataset. A web demo is available.
summary: We explore the generation of visualisations of audio latent spaces using an audio-to-image generation pipeline. We believe this can help with the interpretability of audio latent spaces. We demonstrate a variety of results on the NSynth dataset. A web demo is available.
abstract_zh: 我们探索使用音频到图像生成管道来生成音频潜在空间的可视化。我们相信这有助于提高音频潜在空间的可解释性。我们在 NSynth 数据集上展示了各种结果。提供网络演示。

AI.tldr: 本文通过音频到图像生成管道可视化音频潜在空间，以提升其可解释性。
AI.motivation: 增强对音频潜在空间结构的直观理解与解释能力。
AI.method: 利用音频到图像生成模型构建潜在空间可视化管道。
AI.result: 在NSynth数据集上生成多种可视化结果并提供网络演示。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效展示了音频潜在空间结构，为后续研究提供可视化工具支持。

authors_text: Jacob Sacks,Byron Boots
title: Learning to Optimize in Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 学习模型预测控制中的优化
comment: Proceedings of the IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022. Paper is 6 pages with 2 figures and 2 tables
comments: Proceedings of the IEEE Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2022. Paper is 6 pages with 2 figures and 2 tables
abstract: Sampling-based Model Predictive Control (MPC) is a flexible control framework that can reason about non-smooth dynamics and cost functions. Recently, significant work has focused on the use of machine learning to improve the performance of MPC, often through learning or fine-tuning the dynamics or cost function. In contrast, we focus on learning to optimize more effectively. In other words, to improve the update rule within MPC. We show that this can be particularly useful in sampling-based MPC, where we often wish to minimize the number of samples for computational reasons. Unfortunately, the cost of computational efficiency is a reduction in performance; fewer samples results in noisier updates. We show that we can contend with this noise by learning how to update the control distribution more effectively and make better use of the few samples that we have. Our learned controllers are trained via imitation learning to mimic an expert which has access to substantially more samples. We test the efficacy of our approach on multiple simulated robotics tasks in sample-constrained regimes and demonstrate that our approach can outperform a MPC controller with the same number of samples.
summary: Sampling-based Model Predictive Control (MPC) is a flexible control framework that can reason about non-smooth dynamics and cost functions. Recently, significant work has focused on the use of machine learning to improve the performance of MPC, often through learning or fine-tuning the dynamics or cost function. In contrast, we focus on learning to optimize more effectively. In other words, to improve the update rule within MPC. We show that this can be particularly useful in sampling-based MPC, where we often wish to minimize the number of samples for computational reasons. Unfortunately, the cost of computational efficiency is a reduction in performance; fewer samples results in noisier updates. We show that we can contend with this noise by learning how to update the control distribution more effectively and make better use of the few samples that we have. Our learned controllers are trained via imitation learning to mimic an expert which has access to substantially more samples. We test the efficacy of our approach on multiple simulated robotics tasks in sample-constrained regimes and demonstrate that our approach can outperform a MPC controller with the same number of samples.
abstract_zh: 基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC）是一种灵活的控制框架，可以推理非平滑动态和成本函数。最近，重要的工作集中在使用机器学习来提高 MPC 的性能，通常是通过学习或微调动态或成本函数。相比之下，我们专注于学习更有效地优化。换句话说，就是改进MPC内部的更新规则。我们证明，这在基于采样的 MPC 中特别有用，在这种情况下，出于计算原因，我们经常希望最大限度地减少样本数量。不幸的是，计算效率的代价是性能的降低；更少的样本会导致更新的噪音更大。我们表明，我们可以通过学习如何更有效地更新控制分布并更好地利用我们拥有的少数样本来应对这种噪音。我们的学习控制器通过模仿学习进行训练，以模仿可以访问更多样本的专家。我们在样本受限的情况下测试了我们的方法在多个模拟机器人任务上的有效性，并证明我们的方法可以在相同数量的样本下优于 MPC 控制器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过学习优化规则来改进基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC），以在减少样本数量的同时保持控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于采样的MPC需要大量样本以保证性能，但计算成本高；减少样本会导致更新噪声增大，现有方法难以有效应对这一问题。
AI.method: 采用模仿学习方法，训练控制器模仿一个拥有更多样本的专家策略，学习如何更高效地更新控制分布以利用有限样本。
AI.result: 在多个样本受限的模拟机器人任务中，该方法在相同样本数量下优于传统MPC控制器。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习优化规则，可在减少计算成本的同时提升MPC在样本受限场景下的控制性能。

search_text: Learning to Optimize in Model Predictive Control 学习模型预测控制中的优化 Sampling-based Model Predictive Control (MPC) is a flexible control framework that can reason about non-smooth dynamics and cost functions. Recently, significant work has focused on the use of machine learning to improve the performance of MPC, often through learning or fine-tuning the dynamics or cost function. In contrast, we focus on learning to optimize more effectively. In other words, to improve the update rule within MPC. We show that this can be particularly useful in sampling-based MPC, where we often wish to minimize the number of samples for computational reasons. Unfortunately, the cost of computational efficiency is a reduction in performance; fewer samples results in noisier updates. We show that we can contend with this noise by learning how to update the control distribution more effectively and make better use of the few samples that we have. Our learned controllers are trained via imitation learning to mimic an expert which has access to substantially more samples. We test the efficacy of our approach on multiple simulated robotics tasks in sample-constrained regimes and demonstrate that our approach can outperform a MPC controller with the same number of samples. 基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC）是一种灵活的控制框架，可以推理非平滑动态和成本函数。最近，重要的工作集中在使用机器学习来提高 MPC 的性能，通常是通过学习或微调动态或成本函数。相比之下，我们专注于学习更有效地优化。换句话说，就是改进MPC内部的更新规则。我们证明，这在基于采样的 MPC 中特别有用，在这种情况下，出于计算原因，我们经常希望最大限度地减少样本数量。不幸的是，计算效率的代价是性能的降低；更少的样本会导致更新的噪音更大。我们表明，我们可以通过学习如何更有效地更新控制分布并更好地利用我们拥有的少数样本来应对这种噪音。我们的学习控制器通过模仿学习进行训练，以模仿可以访问更多样本的专家。我们在样本受限的情况下测试了我们的方法在多个模拟机器人任务上的有效性，并证明我们的方法可以在相同数量的样本下优于 MPC 控制器。 本文提出通过学习优化规则来改进基于采样的模型预测控制（MPC），以在减少样本数量的同时保持控制性能。 Jacob Sacks,Byron Boots cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SY

authors_text: Jacob Sacks,Byron Boots
title: Learning Sampling Distributions for Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 学习模型预测控制的采样分布
comment: Accepted at the Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL), 2022. Main paper is 9 pages with 4 figures. Appendix is 12 pages with 11 figures and 1 table
comments: Accepted at the Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL), 2022. Main paper is 9 pages with 4 figures. Appendix is 12 pages with 11 figures and 1 table
abstract: Sampling-based methods have become a cornerstone of contemporary approaches to Model Predictive Control (MPC), as they make no restrictions on the differentiability of the dynamics or cost function and are straightforward to parallelize. However, their efficacy is highly dependent on the quality of the sampling distribution itself, which is often assumed to be simple, like a Gaussian. This restriction can result in samples which are far from optimal, leading to poor performance. Recent work has explored improving the performance of MPC by sampling in a learned latent space of controls. However, these methods ultimately perform all MPC parameter updates and warm-starting between time steps in the control space. This requires us to rely on a number of heuristics for generating samples and updating the distribution and may lead to sub-optimal performance. Instead, we propose to carry out all operations in the latent space, allowing us to take full advantage of the learned distribution. Specifically, we frame the learning problem as bi-level optimization and show how to train the controller with backpropagation-through-time. By using a normalizing flow parameterization of the distribution, we can leverage its tractable density to avoid requiring differentiability of the dynamics and cost function. Finally, we evaluate the proposed approach on simulated robotics tasks and demonstrate its ability to surpass the performance of prior methods and scale better with a reduced number of samples.
summary: Sampling-based methods have become a cornerstone of contemporary approaches to Model Predictive Control (MPC), as they make no restrictions on the differentiability of the dynamics or cost function and are straightforward to parallelize. However, their efficacy is highly dependent on the quality of the sampling distribution itself, which is often assumed to be simple, like a Gaussian. This restriction can result in samples which are far from optimal, leading to poor performance. Recent work has explored improving the performance of MPC by sampling in a learned latent space of controls. However, these methods ultimately perform all MPC parameter updates and warm-starting between time steps in the control space. This requires us to rely on a number of heuristics for generating samples and updating the distribution and may lead to sub-optimal performance. Instead, we propose to carry out all operations in the latent space, allowing us to take full advantage of the learned distribution. Specifically, we frame the learning problem as bi-level optimization and show how to train the controller with backpropagation-through-time. By using a normalizing flow parameterization of the distribution, we can leverage its tractable density to avoid requiring differentiability of the dynamics and cost function. Finally, we evaluate the proposed approach on simulated robotics tasks and demonstrate its ability to surpass the performance of prior methods and scale better with a reduced number of samples.
abstract_zh: 基于采样的方法已成为当代模型预测控制（MPC）方法的基石，因为它们对动态或成本函数的可微性没有限制，并且易于并行化。然而，它们的功效在很大程度上取决于抽样分布本身的质量，而抽样分布通常被认为是简单的，就像高斯分布一样。这种限制可能会导致样本远非最佳，从而导致性能不佳。最近的工作探索了通过在学习到的控制潜在空间中进行采样来提高 MPC 的性能。然而，这些方法最终会在控制空间的时间步之间执行所有 MPC 参数更新和热启动。这要求我们依靠许多启发式方法来生成样本和更新分布，并可能导致性能次优。相反，我们建议在潜在空间中执行所有操作，使我们能够充分利用学习到的分布。具体来说，我们将学习问题构建为双层优化，并展示如何通过时间反向传播来训练控制器。通过使用分布的归一化流参数化，我们可以利用其易处理的密度来避免需要动态和成本函数的可微性。最后，我们在模拟机器人任务上评估所提出的方法，并证明其超越现有方法性能的能力，并通过减少样本数量更好地扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进模型预测控制（MPC）中采样分布的方法，通过在潜在空间中进行操作，提升控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于采样的MPC方法依赖简单分布（如高斯分布），导致采样质量差且需依赖启发式策略，限制了性能。
AI.method: 将学习问题建模为双层优化，利用归一化流参数化分布，并通过反向传播进行训练，所有操作在潜在空间完成。
AI.result: 在模拟机器人任务中，该方法在减少样本数量的情况下优于现有方法，且扩展性更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过潜在空间分布学习与双层优化框架，有效提升了MPC性能，降低了对动态和成本函数可微性的依赖。

authors_text: Danfeng Guo,Zijie Huang,Junheng Hao,Yizhou Sun,Wei Wang,Demetri Terzopoulos
title: A Mobility-Aware Deep Learning Model for Long-Term COVID-19 Pandemic Prediction and Policy Impact Analysis
title_zh: 用于长期 COVID-19 大流行预测和政策影响分析的移动感知深度学习模型
abstract: Pandemic(epidemic) modeling, aiming at disease spreading analysis, has always been a popular research topic especially following the outbreak of COVID-19 in 2019. Some representative models including SIR-based deep learning prediction models have shown satisfactory performance. However, one major drawback for them is that they fall short in their long-term predictive ability. Although graph convolutional networks (GCN) also perform well, their edge representations do not contain complete information and it can lead to biases. Another drawback is that they usually use input features which they are unable to predict. Hence, those models are unable to predict further future. We propose a model that can propagate predictions further into the future and it has better edge representations. In particular, we model the pandemic as a spatial-temporal graph whose edges represent the transition of infections and are learned by our model. We use a two-stream framework that contains GCN and recursive structures (GRU) with an attention mechanism. Our model enables mobility analysis that provides an effective toolbox for public health researchers and policy makers to predict how different lock-down strategies that actively control mobility can influence the spread of pandemics. Experiments show that our model outperforms others in its long-term predictive power. Moreover, we simulate the effects of certain policies and predict their impacts on infection control.
summary: Pandemic(epidemic) modeling, aiming at disease spreading analysis, has always been a popular research topic especially following the outbreak of COVID-19 in 2019. Some representative models including SIR-based deep learning prediction models have shown satisfactory performance. However, one major drawback for them is that they fall short in their long-term predictive ability. Although graph convolutional networks (GCN) also perform well, their edge representations do not contain complete information and it can lead to biases. Another drawback is that they usually use input features which they are unable to predict. Hence, those models are unable to predict further future. We propose a model that can propagate predictions further into the future and it has better edge representations. In particular, we model the pandemic as a spatial-temporal graph whose edges represent the transition of infections and are learned by our model. We use a two-stream framework that contains GCN and recursive structures (GRU) with an attention mechanism. Our model enables mobility analysis that provides an effective toolbox for public health researchers and policy makers to predict how different lock-down strategies that actively control mobility can influence the spread of pandemics. Experiments show that our model outperforms others in its long-term predictive power. Moreover, we simulate the effects of certain policies and predict their impacts on infection control.
abstract_zh: 针对疾病传播分析的Pandemic（流行病）建模一直是热门研究课题，特别是在2019年COVID-19爆发之后。包括基于SIR的深度学习预测模型在内的一些代表性模型表现出了令人满意的性能。然而，它们的一个主要缺点是长期预测能力不足。尽管图卷积网络（GCN）也表现良好，但它们的边缘表示不包含完整的信息，并且可能导致偏差。另一个缺点是他们通常使用无法预测的输入特征。因此，这些模型无法预测进一步的未来。我们提出了一种模型，可以将预测传播到更远的未来，并且具有更好的边缘表示。特别是，我们将流感大流行建模为时空图，其边缘代表感染的转变，并由我们的模型学习。我们使用包含 GCN 和带有注意机制的递归结构（GRU）的双流框架。我们的模型支持流动性分析，为公共卫生研究人员和政策制定者提供了有效的工具箱，以预测主动控制流动性的不同锁定策略如何影响流行病的传播。实验表明，我们的模型在长期预测能力方面优于其他模型。此外，我们模拟某些政策的效果并预测它们对感染控制的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合移动性分析的深度学习模型，用于长期预测新冠疫情并分析政策影响。
AI.motivation: 现有模型如SIR和GCN在长期预测能力不足，且边表示不完整，依赖无法预测的输入特征，难以有效模拟未来疫情传播。
AI.method: 构建时空图模型，边表示感染传播关系并由模型学习；采用双流框架结合图卷积网络（GCN）与门控循环单元（GRU）及注意力机制，实现移动性驱动的预测与政策模拟。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在长期预测性能上优于现有方法，并能有效模拟不同封锁政策对疫情控制的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过改进边表示与未来预测能力，为公共卫生研究者和政策制定者提供了分析移动性调控策略影响的工具。

search_text: A Mobility-Aware Deep Learning Model for Long-Term COVID-19 Pandemic Prediction and Policy Impact Analysis 用于长期 COVID-19 大流行预测和政策影响分析的移动感知深度学习模型 Pandemic(epidemic) modeling, aiming at disease spreading analysis, has always been a popular research topic especially following the outbreak of COVID-19 in 2019. Some representative models including SIR-based deep learning prediction models have shown satisfactory performance. However, one major drawback for them is that they fall short in their long-term predictive ability. Although graph convolutional networks (GCN) also perform well, their edge representations do not contain complete information and it can lead to biases. Another drawback is that they usually use input features which they are unable to predict. Hence, those models are unable to predict further future. We propose a model that can propagate predictions further into the future and it has better edge representations. In particular, we model the pandemic as a spatial-temporal graph whose edges represent the transition of infections and are learned by our model. We use a two-stream framework that contains GCN and recursive structures (GRU) with an attention mechanism. Our model enables mobility analysis that provides an effective toolbox for public health researchers and policy makers to predict how different lock-down strategies that actively control mobility can influence the spread of pandemics. Experiments show that our model outperforms others in its long-term predictive power. Moreover, we simulate the effects of certain policies and predict their impacts on infection control. 针对疾病传播分析的Pandemic（流行病）建模一直是热门研究课题，特别是在2019年COVID-19爆发之后。包括基于SIR的深度学习预测模型在内的一些代表性模型表现出了令人满意的性能。然而，它们的一个主要缺点是长期预测能力不足。尽管图卷积网络（GCN）也表现良好，但它们的边缘表示不包含完整的信息，并且可能导致偏差。另一个缺点是他们通常使用无法预测的输入特征。因此，这些模型无法预测进一步的未来。我们提出了一种模型，可以将预测传播到更远的未来，并且具有更好的边缘表示。特别是，我们将流感大流行建模为时空图，其边缘代表感染的转变，并由我们的模型学习。我们使用包含 GCN 和带有注意机制的递归结构（GRU）的双流框架。我们的模型支持流动性分析，为公共卫生研究人员和政策制定者提供了有效的工具箱，以预测主动控制流动性的不同锁定策略如何影响流行病的传播。实验表明，我们的模型在长期预测能力方面优于其他模型。此外，我们模拟某些政策的效果并预测它们对感染控制的影响。 本文提出一种结合移动性分析的深度学习模型，用于长期预测新冠疫情并分析政策影响。 Danfeng Guo,Zijie Huang,Junheng Hao,Yizhou Sun,Wei Wang,Demetri Terzopoulos cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Zhipeng Du,Jiankang Deng,Miaojing Shi
title: Domain-General Crowd Counting in Unseen Scenarios
title_zh: 未见场景中的领域通用人群计数
comment: Accepted to AAAI 2023 as Oral Presentation
comments: Accepted to AAAI 2023 as Oral Presentation
abstract: Domain shift across crowd data severely hinders crowd counting models to generalize to unseen scenarios. Although domain adaptive crowd counting approaches close this gap to a certain extent, they are still dependent on the target domain data to adapt (e.g. finetune) their models to the specific domain. In this paper, we aim to train a model based on a single source domain which can generalize well on any unseen domain. This falls into the realm of domain generalization that remains unexplored in crowd counting. We first introduce a dynamic sub-domain division scheme which divides the source domain into multiple sub-domains such that we can initiate a meta-learning framework for domain generalization. The sub-domain division is dynamically refined during the meta-learning. Next, in order to disentangle domain-invariant information from domain-specific information in image features, we design the domain-invariant and -specific crowd memory modules to re-encode image features. Two types of losses, i.e. feature reconstruction and orthogonal losses, are devised to enable this disentanglement. Extensive experiments on several standard crowd counting benchmarks i.e. SHA, SHB, QNRF, and NWPU, show the strong generalizability of our method.
summary: Domain shift across crowd data severely hinders crowd counting models to generalize to unseen scenarios. Although domain adaptive crowd counting approaches close this gap to a certain extent, they are still dependent on the target domain data to adapt (e.g. finetune) their models to the specific domain. In this paper, we aim to train a model based on a single source domain which can generalize well on any unseen domain. This falls into the realm of domain generalization that remains unexplored in crowd counting. We first introduce a dynamic sub-domain division scheme which divides the source domain into multiple sub-domains such that we can initiate a meta-learning framework for domain generalization. The sub-domain division is dynamically refined during the meta-learning. Next, in order to disentangle domain-invariant information from domain-specific information in image features, we design the domain-invariant and -specific crowd memory modules to re-encode image features. Two types of losses, i.e. feature reconstruction and orthogonal losses, are devised to enable this disentanglement. Extensive experiments on several standard crowd counting benchmarks i.e. SHA, SHB, QNRF, and NWPU, show the strong generalizability of our method.
abstract_zh: 人群数据的领域转移严重阻碍了人群计数模型推广到未见过的场景。尽管域自适应人群计数方法在一定程度上缩小了这一差距，但它们仍然依赖于目标域数据来调整（例如微调）其模型以适应特定域。在本文中，我们的目标是训练一个基于单个源域的模型，该模型可以很好地推广到任何未见过的域。这属于领域泛化领域，在人群计数中尚未得到探索。我们首先引入一种动态子域划分方案，将源域划分为多个子域，以便我们可以启动用于域泛化的元学习框架。子域划分在元学习过程中动态细化。接下来，为了将图像特征中的领域不变信息与领域特定信息分开，我们设计了领域不变和特定人群记忆模块来重新编码图像特征。设计了两种类型的损失，即特征重建和正交损失来实现这种解开。对几个标准人群计数基准（即 SHA、SHB、QNRF 和 NWPU）的广泛实验表明，我们的方法具有很强的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在训练一个基于单一源域的模型，使其能够很好地泛化到任何未见过的场景，解决人群计数中的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 领域偏移严重阻碍了人群计数模型在未见过场景中的泛化能力。尽管领域自适应方法在一定程度上缩小了这一差距，但它们仍然依赖于目标域数据进行调整。本文希望探索一种无需目标域数据的领域泛化方法。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种动态子领域划分方案，将源域划分为多个子域，并通过元学习框架进行领域泛化。此外，设计了领域不变和领域特定的人群记忆模块，以分离图像特征中的领域不变信息和领域特定信息，并使用特征重建和正交损失实现这一分离。
AI.result: 在SHA、SHB、QNRF和NWPU等多个标准人群计数基准测试中，实验结果表明该方法具有很强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种新的领域泛化方法，能够有效提升人群计数模型在未见过场景中的泛化能力，为领域泛化研究提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Anubhav Jain,Nasir Memon,Julian Togelius
title: A Dataless FaceSwap Detection Approach Using Synthetic Images
title_zh: 使用合成图像的无数据换脸检测方法
abstract: Face swapping technology used to create "Deepfakes" has advanced significantly over the past few years and now enables us to create realistic facial manipulations. Current deep learning algorithms to detect deepfakes have shown promising results, however, they require large amounts of training data, and as we show they are biased towards a particular ethnicity. We propose a deepfake detection methodology that eliminates the need for any real data by making use of synthetically generated data using StyleGAN3. This not only performs at par with the traditional training methodology of using real data but it shows better generalization capabilities when finetuned with a small amount of real data. Furthermore, this also reduces biases created by facial image datasets that might have sparse data from particular ethnicities.
summary: Face swapping technology used to create "Deepfakes" has advanced significantly over the past few years and now enables us to create realistic facial manipulations. Current deep learning algorithms to detect deepfakes have shown promising results, however, they require large amounts of training data, and as we show they are biased towards a particular ethnicity. We propose a deepfake detection methodology that eliminates the need for any real data by making use of synthetically generated data using StyleGAN3. This not only performs at par with the traditional training methodology of using real data but it shows better generalization capabilities when finetuned with a small amount of real data. Furthermore, this also reduces biases created by facial image datasets that might have sparse data from particular ethnicities.
abstract_zh: 用于创建“Deepfakes”的面部交换技术在过去几年中取得了显着进步，现在使我们能够创建逼真的面部操作。当前用于检测深度伪造品的深度学习算法已经显示出有希望的结果，但是，它们需要大量的训练数据，并且正如我们所表明的那样，它们偏向于特定种族。我们提出了一种 Deepfake 检测方法，通过使用 StyleGAN3 综合生成的数据来消除对任何真实数据的需求。这不仅与使用真实数据的传统训练方法的性能相当，而且在使用少量真实数据进行微调时显示出更好的泛化能力。此外，这还减少了面部图像数据集产生的偏差，这些数据集可能具有来自特定种族的稀疏数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需真实数据的深度伪造检测方法，通过合成图像实现人脸交换检测。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测算法依赖大量真实数据且存在种族偏见，而真实数据获取困难且可能携带偏见。
AI.method: 利用StyleGAN3生成合成数据替代真实数据进行训练，并在微调阶段引入少量真实数据以提升性能。
AI.result: 该方法在性能上与传统方法相当，泛化能力更优，且有效缓解了数据集中的种族偏见问题。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据驱动的检测方法可减少对真实数据的依赖，提升模型公平性与泛化能力。

ai_content.result: 该方法在性能上与传统方法相当，泛化能力更优，且有效缓解了数据集中的种族偏见问题。
ai_content.conclusion: 合成数据驱动的检测方法可减少对真实数据的依赖，提升模型公平性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Zhongju Yuan,Zhenkun Wang,Genghui Li
title: Cross-Domain Few-Shot Relation Extraction via Representation Learning and Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 通过表示学习和域适应进行跨域少样本关系提取
abstract: Few-shot relation extraction aims to recognize novel relations with few labeled sentences in each relation. Previous metric-based few-shot relation extraction algorithms identify relationships by comparing the prototypes generated by the few labeled sentences embedding with the embeddings of the query sentences using a trained metric function. However, as these domains always have considerable differences from those in the training dataset, the generalization ability of these approaches on unseen relations in many domains is limited. Since the prototype is necessary for obtaining relationships between entities in the latent space, we suggest learning more interpretable and efficient prototypes from prior knowledge and the intrinsic semantics of relations to extract new relations in various domains more effectively. By exploring the relationships between relations using prior information, we effectively improve the prototype representation of relations. By using contrastive learning to make the classification margins between sentence embedding more distinct, the prototype's geometric interpretability is enhanced. Additionally, utilizing a transfer learning approach for the cross-domain problem allows the generation process of the prototype to account for the gap between other domains, making the prototype more robust and enabling the better extraction of associations across multiple domains. The experiment results on the benchmark FewRel dataset demonstrate the advantages of the suggested method over some state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Few-shot relation extraction aims to recognize novel relations with few labeled sentences in each relation. Previous metric-based few-shot relation extraction algorithms identify relationships by comparing the prototypes generated by the few labeled sentences embedding with the embeddings of the query sentences using a trained metric function. However, as these domains always have considerable differences from those in the training dataset, the generalization ability of these approaches on unseen relations in many domains is limited. Since the prototype is necessary for obtaining relationships between entities in the latent space, we suggest learning more interpretable and efficient prototypes from prior knowledge and the intrinsic semantics of relations to extract new relations in various domains more effectively. By exploring the relationships between relations using prior information, we effectively improve the prototype representation of relations. By using contrastive learning to make the classification margins between sentence embedding more distinct, the prototype's geometric interpretability is enhanced. Additionally, utilizing a transfer learning approach for the cross-domain problem allows the generation process of the prototype to account for the gap between other domains, making the prototype more robust and enabling the better extraction of associations across multiple domains. The experiment results on the benchmark FewRel dataset demonstrate the advantages of the suggested method over some state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 少镜头关系提取旨在识别每个关系中带有少量标记句子的新关系。先前基于度量的少样本关系提取算法通过使用经过训练的度量函数将少数标记句子嵌入生成的原型与查询句子的嵌入进行比较来识别关系。然而，由于这些领域总是与训练数据集中的领域存在很大差异，因此这些方法对许多领域中未见关系的泛化能力是有限的。由于原型对于获取潜在空间中实体之间的关系是必要的，因此我们建议从先验知识和关系的内在语义中学习更可解释和更有效的原型，以更有效地提取各个领域中的新关系。通过使用先验信息探索关系之间的关系，我们有效地改进了关系的原型表示。通过使用对比学习使句子嵌入之间的分类边界更加明显，增强了原型的几何可解释性。此外，利用迁移学习方法来解决跨域问题可以使原型的生成过程能够考虑其他域之间的差距，从而使原型更加稳健，并能够更好地提取跨多个域的关联。基准 FewRel 数据集上的实验结果证明了所建议的方法相对于一些最先进的方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨领域少样本关系抽取方法，通过表示学习和领域适应技术提升模型在不同领域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本关系抽取方法在跨领域场景下因领域差异大而泛化能力不足，需改进原型表示以适应多领域关系抽取需求。
AI.method: 结合先验知识与关系语义优化原型表示，利用对比学习增强嵌入区分度，并采用迁移学习缩小领域差异以提升跨领域适应性。
AI.result: 在FewRel基准数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合表示学习与领域适应技术，本文方法有效解决了跨领域少样本关系抽取中的原型鲁棒性与泛化性问题。

authors_text: Weiyuan Gong,Chenyi Zhang,Tongyang Li
title: Robustness of Quantum Algorithms for Nonconvex Optimization
title_zh: 非凸优化量子算法的鲁棒性
abstract: Recent results suggest that quantum computers possess the potential to speed up nonconvex optimization problems. However, a crucial factor for the implementation of quantum optimization algorithms is their robustness against experimental and statistical noises. In this paper, we systematically study quantum algorithms for finding an $ε$-approximate second-order stationary point ($ε$-SOSP) of a $d$-dimensional nonconvex function, a fundamental problem in nonconvex optimization, with noisy zeroth- or first-order oracles as inputs. We first prove that, up to noise of $O(ε^{10}/d^5)$, accelerated perturbed gradient descent with quantum gradient estimation takes $O(\log d/ε^{1.75})$ quantum queries to find an $ε$-SOSP. We then prove that perturbed gradient descent is robust to the noise of $O(ε^6/d^4)$ and $O(ε/d^{0.5+ζ})$ for $ζ>0$ on the zeroth- and first-order oracles, respectively, which provides a quantum algorithm with poly-logarithmic query complexity. We then propose a stochastic gradient descent algorithm using quantum mean estimation on the Gaussian smoothing of noisy oracles, which is robust to $O(ε^{1.5}/d)$ and $O(ε/\sqrt{d})$ noise on the zeroth- and first-order oracles, respectively. The quantum algorithm takes $O(d^{2.5}/ε^{3.5})$ and $O(d^2/ε^3)$ queries to the two oracles, giving a polynomial speedup over the classical counterparts. Moreover, we characterize the domains where quantum algorithms can find an $ε$-SOSP with poly-logarithmic, polynomial, or exponential number of queries in $d$, or the problem is information-theoretically unsolvable even by an infinite number of queries. In addition, we prove an $Ω(ε^{-12/7})$ lower bound in $ε$ for any randomized classical and quantum algorithm to find an $ε$-SOSP using either noisy zeroth- or first-order oracles.
summary: Recent results suggest that quantum computers possess the potential to speed up nonconvex optimization problems. However, a crucial factor for the implementation of quantum optimization algorithms is their robustness against experimental and statistical noises. In this paper, we systematically study quantum algorithms for finding an $ε$-approximate second-order stationary point ($ε$-SOSP) of a $d$-dimensional nonconvex function, a fundamental problem in nonconvex optimization, with noisy zeroth- or first-order oracles as inputs. We first prove that, up to noise of $O(ε^{10}/d^5)$, accelerated perturbed gradient descent with quantum gradient estimation takes $O(\log d/ε^{1.75})$ quantum queries to find an $ε$-SOSP. We then prove that perturbed gradient descent is robust to the noise of $O(ε^6/d^4)$ and $O(ε/d^{0.5+ζ})$ for $ζ>0$ on the zeroth- and first-order oracles, respectively, which provides a quantum algorithm with poly-logarithmic query complexity. We then propose a stochastic gradient descent algorithm using quantum mean estimation on the Gaussian smoothing of noisy oracles, which is robust to $O(ε^{1.5}/d)$ and $O(ε/\sqrt{d})$ noise on the zeroth- and first-order oracles, respectively. The quantum algorithm takes $O(d^{2.5}/ε^{3.5})$ and $O(d^2/ε^3)$ queries to the two oracles, giving a polynomial speedup over the classical counterparts. Moreover, we characterize the domains where quantum algorithms can find an $ε$-SOSP with poly-logarithmic, polynomial, or exponential number of queries in $d$, or the problem is information-theoretically unsolvable even by an infinite number of queries. In addition, we prove an $Ω(ε^{-12/7})$ lower bound in $ε$ for any randomized classical and quantum algorithm to find an $ε$-SOSP using either noisy zeroth- or first-order oracles.
abstract_zh: 最近的结果表明，量子计算机具有加速非凸优化问题的潜力。然而，实现量子优化算法的一个关键因素是它们对实验和统计噪声的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们系统地研究了寻找 $d$ 维非凸函数的 $ε$ 近似二阶驻点 ($ε$-SOSP) 的量子算法，这是非凸优化中的一个基本问题，以噪声零阶或一阶预言作为输入。我们首先证明，在 $O(ε^{10}/d^5)$ 噪声下，通过量子梯度估计加速扰动梯度下降需要 $O(\log d/ε^{1.75})$ 量子查询来找到 $ε$-SOSP。然后，我们证明了扰动梯度下降对于零阶和一阶预言机上的 $O(ε^6/d^4)$ 和 $O(ε/d^{0.5+ze})$ 噪声具有鲁棒性，这分别提供了具有多对数查询复杂度的量子算法，其中 $ze>0$。然后，我们提出了一种使用量子均值估计对噪声预言机高斯平滑进行随机梯度下降算法，该算法分别对零阶和一阶预言机上的 $O(ε^{1.5}/d)$ 和 $O(ε/\sqrt{d})$ 噪声具有鲁棒性。量子算法对两个预言机进行 $O(d^{2.5}/ε^{3.5})$ 和 $O(d^2/ε^3)$ 查询，比经典算法提供多项式加速。此外，我们还描述了量子算法可以在 $d$ 中找到具有多对数、多项式或指数数量的查询的 $ε$-SOSP 的域，或者即使通过无限数量的查询，该问题在信息理论上也是无法解决的。此外，我们证明了任何随机经典和量子算法在 $ε$ 中的 $Ω(ε^{-12/7})$ 下界，以使用噪声零阶或一阶预言找到 $ε$-SOSP。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了量子算法在非凸优化问题中的鲁棒性，特别是在存在噪声的零阶或一阶oracle输入下的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管量子计算在非凸优化中展现出加速潜力，但实验和统计噪声对量子优化算法的鲁棒性仍是实现的关键挑战。
AI.method: 通过分析噪声水平下的加速扰动梯度下降法、量子梯度估计及高斯平滑的随机梯度下降算法，结合量子均值估计技术，推导不同噪声条件下的查询复杂度。
AI.result: 证明了量子算法在特定噪声范围内可实现对数复杂度或多项式加速，并给出了经典与量子算法的ε-SOSP问题下界Ω(ε^{-12/7})。
AI.conclusion: 量子算法在非凸优化中可提供多项式加速，但其性能依赖于噪声水平与问题域，部分场景仍存在信息论层面的不可解性。

The quantum algorithm takes $O(d^{2.5}/ε^{3.5})$ and $O(d^2/ε^3)$ queries to the two oracles, giving a polynomial speedup over the classical counterparts. Moreover, we characterize the domains where quantum algorithms can find an $ε$-SOSP with poly-logarithmic, polynomial, or exponential number of queries in $d$, or the problem is information-theoretically unsolvable even by an infinite number of queries. In addition, we prove an $Ω(ε^{-12/7})$ lower bound in $ε$ for any randomized classical and quantum algorithm to find an $ε$-SOSP using either noisy zeroth- or first-order oracles. 最近的结果表明，量子计算机具有加速非凸优化问题的潜力。然而，实现量子优化算法的一个关键因素是它们对实验和统计噪声的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们系统地研究了寻找 $d$ 维非凸函数的 $ε$ 近似二阶驻点 ($ε$-SOSP) 的量子算法，这是非凸优化中的一个基本问题，以噪声零阶或一阶预言作为输入。我们首先证明，在 $O(ε^{10}/d^5)$ 噪声下，通过量子梯度估计加速扰动梯度下降需要 $O(\log d/ε^{1.75})$ 量子查询来找到 $ε$-SOSP。然后，我们证明了扰动梯度下降对于零阶和一阶预言机上的 $O(ε^6/d^4)$ 和 $O(ε/d^{0.5+ze})$ 噪声具有鲁棒性，这分别提供了具有多对数查询复杂度的量子算法，其中 $ze>0$。然后，我们提出了一种使用量子均值估计对噪声预言机高斯平滑进行随机梯度下降算法，该算法分别对零阶和一阶预言机上的 $O(ε^{1.5}/d)$ 和 $O(ε/\sqrt{d})$ 噪声具有鲁棒性。量子算法对两个预言机进行 $O(d^{2.5}/ε^{3.5})$ 和 $O(d^2/ε^3)$ 查询，比经典算法提供多项式加速。此外，我们还描述了量子算法可以在 $d$ 中找到具有多对数、多项式或指数数量的查询的 $ε$-SOSP 的域，或者即使通过无限数量的查询，该问题在信息理论上也是无法解决的。此外，我们证明了任何随机经典和量子算法在 $ε$ 中的 $Ω(ε^{-12/7})$ 下界，以使用噪声零阶或一阶预言找到 $ε$-SOSP。 本文系统研究了量子算法在非凸优化问题中的鲁棒性，特别是在存在噪声的零阶或一阶oracle输入下的性能。 Weiyuan Gong,Chenyi Zhang,Tongyang Li quant-ph,cs.DS

authors_text: Weiyuan Gong,Dong Yuan,Weikang Li,Dong-Ling Deng
title: Enhancing Quantum Adversarial Robustness by Randomized Encodings
title_zh: 通过随机编码增强量子对抗鲁棒性
abstract: The interplay between quantum physics and machine learning gives rise to the emergent frontier of quantum machine learning, where advanced quantum learning models may outperform their classical counterparts in solving certain challenging problems. However, quantum learning systems are vulnerable to adversarial attacks: adding tiny carefully-crafted perturbations on legitimate input samples can cause misclassifications. To address this issue, we propose a general scheme to protect quantum learning systems from adversarial attacks by randomly encoding the legitimate data samples through unitary or quantum error correction encoders. In particular, we rigorously prove that both global and local random unitary encoders lead to exponentially vanishing gradients (i.e. barren plateaus) for any variational quantum circuits that aim to add adversarial perturbations, independent of the input data and the inner structures of adversarial circuits and quantum classifiers. In addition, we prove a rigorous bound on the vulnerability of quantum classifiers under local unitary adversarial attacks. We show that random black-box quantum error correction encoders can protect quantum classifiers against local adversarial noises and their robustness increases as we concatenate error correction codes. To quantify the robustness enhancement, we adapt quantum differential privacy as a measure of the prediction stability for quantum classifiers. Our results establish versatile defense strategies for quantum classifiers against adversarial perturbations, which provide valuable guidance to enhance the reliability and security for both near-term and future quantum learning technologies.
summary: The interplay between quantum physics and machine learning gives rise to the emergent frontier of quantum machine learning, where advanced quantum learning models may outperform their classical counterparts in solving certain challenging problems. However, quantum learning systems are vulnerable to adversarial attacks: adding tiny carefully-crafted perturbations on legitimate input samples can cause misclassifications. To address this issue, we propose a general scheme to protect quantum learning systems from adversarial attacks by randomly encoding the legitimate data samples through unitary or quantum error correction encoders. In particular, we rigorously prove that both global and local random unitary encoders lead to exponentially vanishing gradients (i.e. barren plateaus) for any variational quantum circuits that aim to add adversarial perturbations, independent of the input data and the inner structures of adversarial circuits and quantum classifiers. In addition, we prove a rigorous bound on the vulnerability of quantum classifiers under local unitary adversarial attacks. We show that random black-box quantum error correction encoders can protect quantum classifiers against local adversarial noises and their robustness increases as we concatenate error correction codes. To quantify the robustness enhancement, we adapt quantum differential privacy as a measure of the prediction stability for quantum classifiers. Our results establish versatile defense strategies for quantum classifiers against adversarial perturbations, which provide valuable guidance to enhance the reliability and security for both near-term and future quantum learning technologies.
abstract_zh: 量子物理和机器学习之间的相互作用催生了量子机器学习的新兴前沿，其中先进的量子学习模型在解决某些具有挑战性的问题方面可能优于经典模型。然而，量子学习系统很容易受到对抗性攻击：在合法输入样本上添加精心设计的微小扰动可能会导致错误分类。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种通用方案，通过单一或量子纠错编码器对合法数据样本进行随机编码，从而保护量子学习系统免受对抗性攻击。特别是，我们严格证明，对于任何旨在添加对抗性扰动的变分量子电路，全局和局部随机酉编码器都会导致指数级消失的梯度（即贫瘠平台），而与输入数据以及对抗性电路和量子分类器的内部结构无关。此外，我们证明了量子分类器在局部单一对抗攻击下的脆弱性的严格界限。我们证明，随机黑盒量子纠错编码器可以保护量子分类器免受局部对抗性噪声的影响，并且当我们串联纠错码时，它们的鲁棒性会增加。为了量化鲁棒性的增强，我们采用量子差分隐私作为量子分类器预测稳定性的衡量标准。我们的研究结果为量子分类器建立了针对对抗性扰动的多功能防御策略，这为增强近期和未来量子学习技术的可靠性和安全性提供了宝贵的指导。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过随机编码增强量子机器学习系统对抗攻击鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 量子机器学习系统在面对精心设计的对抗性攻击时容易出现误分类，因此需要一种有效的方法来提升其安全性。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种通用方案，通过使用随机的酉编码或量子纠错编码对合法数据样本进行编码，以防止对抗性攻击。
AI.result: 该方法证明了随机酉编码会导致对抗性变分量子电路的梯度指数级消失，同时展示了量子纠错编码在增强分类器鲁棒性方面的作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为量子分类器提供了多种防御策略，有助于提升近期和未来量子学习技术的可靠性和安全性。

authors_text: Yizhi Li,Ruibin Yuan,Ge Zhang,Yinghao Ma,Chenghua Lin,Xingran Chen,Anton Ragni,Hanzhi Yin,Zhijie Hu,Haoyu He,Emmanouil Benetos,Norbert Gyenge,Ruibo Liu,Jie Fu
title: MAP-Music2Vec: A Simple and Effective Baseline for Self-Supervised Music Audio Representation Learning
title_zh: MAP-Music2Vec：用于自监督音乐音频表示学习的简单而有效的基线
abstract: The deep learning community has witnessed an exponentially growing interest in self-supervised learning (SSL). However, it still remains unexplored how to build a framework for learning useful representations of raw music waveforms in a self-supervised manner. In this work, we design Music2Vec, a framework exploring different SSL algorithmic components and tricks for music audio recordings. Our model achieves comparable results to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) music SSL model Jukebox, despite being significantly smaller with less than 2% of parameters of the latter. The model will be released on Huggingface(Please refer to: https://huggingface.co/m-a-p/music2vec-v1)
summary: The deep learning community has witnessed an exponentially growing interest in self-supervised learning (SSL). However, it still remains unexplored how to build a framework for learning useful representations of raw music waveforms in a self-supervised manner. In this work, we design Music2Vec, a framework exploring different SSL algorithmic components and tricks for music audio recordings. Our model achieves comparable results to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) music SSL model Jukebox, despite being significantly smaller with less than 2% of parameters of the latter. The model will be released on Huggingface(Please refer to: https://huggingface.co/m-a-p/music2vec-v1)
abstract_zh: 深度学习社区对自我监督学习（SSL）的兴趣呈指数级增长。然而，如何构建一个框架来以自我监督的方式学习原始音乐波形的有用表示仍然尚未被探索。在这项工作中，我们设计了 Music2Vec，一个探索不同 SSL 算法组件和音乐录音技巧的框架。我们的模型取得了与最先进 (SOTA) 音乐 SSL 模型 Jukebox 相当的结果，尽管它的参数明显小于后者的 2%。该模型将在Huggingface上发布（请参考：https://huggingface.co/m-a-p/music2vec-v1）

AI.tldr: 本文提出Music2Vec框架，用于通过自监督学习从原始音乐波形中学习有效的音频表示。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在深度学习领域受到广泛关注，但如何为音乐音频构建自监督学习框架仍属未解难题，亟需简单有效的基线方法。
AI.method: 设计Music2Vec框架，探索不同自监督算法组件和技巧，通过优化模型结构和训练策略实现高效学习。
AI.result: 模型参数量仅为Jukebox的2%却达到同类最先进水平，验证了框架有效性并已开源发布。
AI.conclusion: Music2Vec证明了通过精心设计的自监督框架，小型模型可实现与大型模型相当的音乐音频表征能力。

authors_text: Lucas Biaggi,João P. Papa,Kelton A. P Costa,Danillo R. Pereira,Leandro A. Passos
title: FEMa-FS: Finite Element Machines for Feature Selection
title_zh: FEMa-FS：用于特征选择的有限元机
abstract: Identifying anomalies has become one of the primary strategies towards security and protection procedures in computer networks. In this context, machine learning-based methods emerge as an elegant solution to identify such scenarios and learn irrelevant information so that a reduction in the identification time and possible gain in accuracy can be obtained. This paper proposes a novel feature selection approach called Finite Element Machines for Feature Selection (FEMa-FS), which uses the framework of finite elements to identify the most relevant information from a given dataset. Although FEMa-FS can be applied to any application domain, it has been evaluated in the context of anomaly detection in computer networks. The outcomes over two datasets showed promising results.
summary: Identifying anomalies has become one of the primary strategies towards security and protection procedures in computer networks. In this context, machine learning-based methods emerge as an elegant solution to identify such scenarios and learn irrelevant information so that a reduction in the identification time and possible gain in accuracy can be obtained. This paper proposes a novel feature selection approach called Finite Element Machines for Feature Selection (FEMa-FS), which uses the framework of finite elements to identify the most relevant information from a given dataset. Although FEMa-FS can be applied to any application domain, it has been evaluated in the context of anomaly detection in computer networks. The outcomes over two datasets showed promising results.
abstract_zh: 识别异常已成为计算机网络安全和保护程序的主要策略之一。在这种情况下，基于机器学习的方法成为识别此类场景并学习不相关信息的优雅解决方案，从而减少识别时间并可能提高准确性。本文提出了一种称为特征选择有限元机（FEMa-FS）的新颖特征选择方法，该方法使用有限元框架从给定数据集中识别最相关的信息。尽管 FEMa-FS 可以应用于任何应用领域，但它已在计算机网络异常检测的背景下进行了评估。两个数据集的结果显示出有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于有限元框架的特征选择方法FEMa-FS，并应用于网络异常检测任务。
AI.motivation: 网络异常检测需要高效识别关键特征以减少计算时间并提高准确性，传统方法存在特征选择效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 构建有限元机器框架，通过有限元分析技术从数据集中筛选最具判别性的特征子集。
AI.result: 在两个网络异常检测数据集上验证，FEMa-FS展现出优于传统方法的特征选择效果和检测性能。
AI.conclusion: FEMa-FS作为通用特征选择方法，在网络安全领域具有应用价值，可扩展至其他数据挖掘场景。

search_text: FEMa-FS: Finite Element Machines for Feature Selection FEMa-FS：用于特征选择的有限元机 Identifying anomalies has become one of the primary strategies towards security and protection procedures in computer networks. In this context, machine learning-based methods emerge as an elegant solution to identify such scenarios and learn irrelevant information so that a reduction in the identification time and possible gain in accuracy can be obtained. This paper proposes a novel feature selection approach called Finite Element Machines for Feature Selection (FEMa-FS), which uses the framework of finite elements to identify the most relevant information from a given dataset. Although FEMa-FS can be applied to any application domain, it has been evaluated in the context of anomaly detection in computer networks. The outcomes over two datasets showed promising results. 识别异常已成为计算机网络安全和保护程序的主要策略之一。在这种情况下，基于机器学习的方法成为识别此类场景并学习不相关信息的优雅解决方案，从而减少识别时间并可能提高准确性。本文提出了一种称为特征选择有限元机（FEMa-FS）的新颖特征选择方法，该方法使用有限元框架从给定数据集中识别最相关的信息。尽管 FEMa-FS 可以应用于任何应用领域，但它已在计算机网络异常检测的背景下进行了评估。两个数据集的结果显示出有希望的结果。 本文提出一种基于有限元框架的特征选择方法FEMa-FS，并应用于网络异常检测任务。 Lucas Biaggi,João P. Papa,Kelton A. P Costa,Danillo R. Pereira,Leandro A. Passos cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Anuja Vats,Ahmed Mohammed,Marius Pedersen,Nirmalie Wiratunga
title: This changes to that : Combining causal and non-causal explanations to generate disease progression in capsule endoscopy
title_zh: 这改变了：结合因果和非因果解释来产生胶囊内窥镜检查中的疾病进展
comment: ef:ICASSP 2023 - 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
comments: ef:ICASSP 2023 - 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Due to the unequivocal need for understanding the decision processes of deep learning networks, both modal-dependent and model-agnostic techniques have become very popular. Although both of these ideas provide transparency for automated decision making, most methodologies focus on either using the modal-gradients (model-dependent) or ignoring the model internal states and reasoning with a model's behavior/outcome (model-agnostic) to instances. In this work, we propose a unified explanation approach that given an instance combines both model-dependent and agnostic explanations to produce an explanation set. The generated explanations are not only consistent in the neighborhood of a sample but can highlight causal relationships between image content and the outcome. We use Wireless Capsule Endoscopy (WCE) domain to illustrate the effectiveness of our explanations. The saliency maps generated by our approach are comparable or better on the softmax information score.
summary: Due to the unequivocal need for understanding the decision processes of deep learning networks, both modal-dependent and model-agnostic techniques have become very popular. Although both of these ideas provide transparency for automated decision making, most methodologies focus on either using the modal-gradients (model-dependent) or ignoring the model internal states and reasoning with a model's behavior/outcome (model-agnostic) to instances. In this work, we propose a unified explanation approach that given an instance combines both model-dependent and agnostic explanations to produce an explanation set. The generated explanations are not only consistent in the neighborhood of a sample but can highlight causal relationships between image content and the outcome. We use Wireless Capsule Endoscopy (WCE) domain to illustrate the effectiveness of our explanations. The saliency maps generated by our approach are comparable or better on the softmax information score.
abstract_zh: 由于对理解深度学习网络决策过程的明确需求，模态相关和模型无关的技术都变得非常流行。尽管这两种想法都为自动化决策提供了透明度，但大多数方法都侧重于使用模态梯度（模型相关）或忽略模型内部状态以及用模型的行为/结果（与模型无关）对实例进行推理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种统一的解释方法，给定一个实例，结合模型相关的解释和不可知的解释来生成解释集。生成的解释不仅在样本附近一致，而且可以突出图像内容和结果之间的因果关系。我们使用无线胶囊内窥镜（WCE）领域来说明我们解释的有效性。我们的方法生成的显着图在 softmax 信息得分上具有可比性或更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合因果与非因果解释的方法，用于生成胶囊内镜中的疾病进展解释，以提高深度学习决策的透明度。
AI.motivation: 现有解释方法多侧重模型依赖或模型无关技术，难以全面揭示决策过程中的因果关系，需统一方法提升透明度。
AI.method: 提出统一框架融合模型依赖（模态梯度）与模型无关解释，生成一致性解释集，突出图像内容与结果间的因果关系，并在WCE中验证。
AI.result: 生成的显著性图在softmax信息评分上表现优于或等同于现有方法，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合两种解释方式，提升疾病进展解释的准确性与因果性，为医疗影像分析提供可靠工具。

authors_text: Maximilian Zipfl,Felix Hertlein,Achim Rettinger,Steffen Thoma,Lavdim Halilaj,Juergen Luettin,Stefan Schmid,Cory Henson
title: Relation-based Motion Prediction using Traffic Scene Graphs
title_zh: 使用交通场景图进行基于关系的运动预测
abstract: Representing relevant information of a traffic scene and understanding its environment is crucial for the success of autonomous driving. Modeling the surrounding of an autonomous car using semantic relations, i.e., how different traffic participants relate in the context of traffic rule based behaviors, is hardly been considered in previous work. This stems from the fact that these relations are hard to extract from real-world traffic scenes. In this work, we model traffic scenes in a form of spatial semantic scene graphs for various different predictions about the traffic participants, e.g., acceleration and deceleration. Our learning and inference approach uses Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and shows that incorporating explicit information about the spatial semantic relations between traffic participants improves the predicdtion results. Specifically, the acceleration prediction of traffic participants is improved by up to 12% compared to the baselines, which do not exploit this explicit information. Furthermore, by including additional information about previous scenes, we achieve 73% improvements.
summary: Representing relevant information of a traffic scene and understanding its environment is crucial for the success of autonomous driving. Modeling the surrounding of an autonomous car using semantic relations, i.e., how different traffic participants relate in the context of traffic rule based behaviors, is hardly been considered in previous work. This stems from the fact that these relations are hard to extract from real-world traffic scenes. In this work, we model traffic scenes in a form of spatial semantic scene graphs for various different predictions about the traffic participants, e.g., acceleration and deceleration. Our learning and inference approach uses Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and shows that incorporating explicit information about the spatial semantic relations between traffic participants improves the predicdtion results. Specifically, the acceleration prediction of traffic participants is improved by up to 12% compared to the baselines, which do not exploit this explicit information. Furthermore, by including additional information about previous scenes, we achieve 73% improvements.
abstract_zh: 表示交通场景的相关信息并理解其环境对于自动驾驶的成功至关重要。使用语义关系（即不同交通参与者在基于交通规则的行为背景下如何相互关联）对自动驾驶汽车的周围环境进行建模，在以前的工作中几乎没有被考虑过。这是因为这些关系很难从现实世界的交通场景中提取。在这项工作中，我们以空间语义场景图的形式对交通场景进行建模，以对交通参与者进行各种不同的预测，例如加速和减速。我们的学习和推理方法使用图神经网络（GNN），并表明合并有关交通参与者之间空间语义关系的显式信息可以改善预测结果。具体而言，与未利用此显式信息的基线相比，交通参与者的加速度预测提高了 12%。此外，通过包含有关先前场景的附加信息，我们实现了 73% 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于交通场景图的语义关系建模方法，用于提升交通参与者运动预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法未充分考虑交通参与者间的语义关系，而这些关系对理解交通行为至关重要但难以从现实场景中提取。
AI.method: 构建空间语义场景图并采用图神经网络（GNNs），结合历史场景信息进行学习和预测。
AI.result: 加速预测相较基线提升12%，结合历史场景信息后进一步提升73%。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模交通参与者间的语义关系能有效提升预测性能，尤其在融合历史数据时效果显著。

authors_text: Anh-Quan Cao,Raoul de Charette
title: SceneRF: Self-Supervised Monocular 3D Scene Reconstruction with Radiance Fields
title_zh: SceneRF：利用辐射场进行自监督单目 3D 场景重建
abstract: 3D reconstruction from a single 2D image was extensively covered in the literature but relies on depth supervision at training time, which limits its applicability. To relax the dependence to depth we propose SceneRF, a self-supervised monocular scene reconstruction method using only posed image sequences for training. Fueled by the recent progress in neural radiance fields (NeRF) we optimize a radiance field though with explicit depth optimization and a novel probabilistic sampling strategy to efficiently handle large scenes. At inference, a single input image suffices to hallucinate novel depth views which are fused together to obtain 3D scene reconstruction. Thorough experiments demonstrate that we outperform all baselines for novel depth views synthesis and scene reconstruction, on indoor BundleFusion and outdoor SemanticKITTI. Code is available at https://astra-vision.github.io/SceneRF .
summary: 3D reconstruction from a single 2D image was extensively covered in the literature but relies on depth supervision at training time, which limits its applicability. To relax the dependence to depth we propose SceneRF, a self-supervised monocular scene reconstruction method using only posed image sequences for training. Fueled by the recent progress in neural radiance fields (NeRF) we optimize a radiance field though with explicit depth optimization and a novel probabilistic sampling strategy to efficiently handle large scenes. At inference, a single input image suffices to hallucinate novel depth views which are fused together to obtain 3D scene reconstruction. Thorough experiments demonstrate that we outperform all baselines for novel depth views synthesis and scene reconstruction, on indoor BundleFusion and outdoor SemanticKITTI. Code is available at https://astra-vision.github.io/SceneRF .
abstract_zh: 文献中广泛介绍了从单个 2D 图像进行 3D 重建，但依赖于训练时的深度监督，这限制了其适用性。为了放松对深度的依赖，我们提出了 SceneRF，一种仅使用姿势图像序列进行训练的自监督单目场景重建方法。在神经辐射场（NeRF）最新进展的推动下，我们通过显式深度优化和新颖的概率采样策略来优化辐射场，以有效处理大型场景。推理时，单个输入图像足以产生新的深度视图的幻觉，这些深度视图被融合在一起以获得 3D 场景重建。彻底的实验表明，我们在室内 BundleFusion 和室外 SemanticKITTI 上的新型深度视图合成和场景重建方面优于所有基线。代码可在 https://astra-vision.github.io/SceneRF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SceneRF，一种无需深度监督的自监督单目3D场景重建方法，通过姿势图像序列训练，结合显式深度优化和概率采样策略实现大场景重建。
AI.motivation: 传统单目3D重建依赖深度监督限制了应用，需开发无需深度数据的自监督方法以提升适用性。
AI.method: 基于NeRF框架，通过显式深度优化和概率采样策略处理大场景，在推理阶段仅需单张图像生成新视角深度图并融合重建3D场景。
AI.result: 在室内BundleFusion和室外SemanticKITTI数据集上，SceneRF在新视角合成和场景重建任务中均优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SceneRF验证了自监督单目3D重建的可行性，通过优化深度估计和采样策略有效提升了大场景重建质量。

search_text: SceneRF: Self-Supervised Monocular 3D Scene Reconstruction with Radiance Fields SceneRF：利用辐射场进行自监督单目 3D 场景重建 3D reconstruction from a single 2D image was extensively covered in the literature but relies on depth supervision at training time, which limits its applicability. To relax the dependence to depth we propose SceneRF, a self-supervised monocular scene reconstruction method using only posed image sequences for training. Fueled by the recent progress in neural radiance fields (NeRF) we optimize a radiance field though with explicit depth optimization and a novel probabilistic sampling strategy to efficiently handle large scenes. At inference, a single input image suffices to hallucinate novel depth views which are fused together to obtain 3D scene reconstruction. Thorough experiments demonstrate that we outperform all baselines for novel depth views synthesis and scene reconstruction, on indoor BundleFusion and outdoor SemanticKITTI. Code is available at https://astra-vision.github.io/SceneRF . 文献中广泛介绍了从单个 2D 图像进行 3D 重建，但依赖于训练时的深度监督，这限制了其适用性。为了放松对深度的依赖，我们提出了 SceneRF，一种仅使用姿势图像序列进行训练的自监督单目场景重建方法。在神经辐射场（NeRF）最新进展的推动下，我们通过显式深度优化和新颖的概率采样策略来优化辐射场，以有效处理大型场景。推理时，单个输入图像足以产生新的深度视图的幻觉，这些深度视图被融合在一起以获得 3D 场景重建。彻底的实验表明，我们在室内 BundleFusion 和室外 SemanticKITTI 上的新型深度视图合成和场景重建方面优于所有基线。代码可在 https://astra-vision.github.io/SceneRF 获取。 本文提出SceneRF，一种无需深度监督的自监督单目3D场景重建方法，通过姿势图像序列训练，结合显式深度优化和概率采样策略实现大场景重建。 Anh-Quan Cao,Raoul de Charette cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR,cs.RO

authors_text: Ye Yuan,Jiaming Song,Umar Iqbal,Arash Vahdat,Jan Kautz
title: PhysDiff: Physics-Guided Human Motion Diffusion Model
title_zh: PhysDiff：物理引导的人体运动扩散模型
abstract: Denoising diffusion models hold great promise for generating diverse and realistic human motions. However, existing motion diffusion models largely disregard the laws of physics in the diffusion process and often generate physically-implausible motions with pronounced artifacts such as floating, foot sliding, and ground penetration. This seriously impacts the quality of generated motions and limits their real-world application. To address this issue, we present a novel physics-guided motion diffusion model (PhysDiff), which incorporates physical constraints into the diffusion process. Specifically, we propose a physics-based motion projection module that uses motion imitation in a physics simulator to project the denoised motion of a diffusion step to a physically-plausible motion. The projected motion is further used in the next diffusion step to guide the denoising diffusion process. Intuitively, the use of physics in our model iteratively pulls the motion toward a physically-plausible space, which cannot be achieved by simple post-processing. Experiments on large-scale human motion datasets show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art motion quality and improves physical plausibility drastically (>78% for all datasets).
summary: Denoising diffusion models hold great promise for generating diverse and realistic human motions. However, existing motion diffusion models largely disregard the laws of physics in the diffusion process and often generate physically-implausible motions with pronounced artifacts such as floating, foot sliding, and ground penetration. This seriously impacts the quality of generated motions and limits their real-world application. To address this issue, we present a novel physics-guided motion diffusion model (PhysDiff), which incorporates physical constraints into the diffusion process. Specifically, we propose a physics-based motion projection module that uses motion imitation in a physics simulator to project the denoised motion of a diffusion step to a physically-plausible motion. The projected motion is further used in the next diffusion step to guide the denoising diffusion process. Intuitively, the use of physics in our model iteratively pulls the motion toward a physically-plausible space, which cannot be achieved by simple post-processing. Experiments on large-scale human motion datasets show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art motion quality and improves physical plausibility drastically (>78% for all datasets).
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散模型对于生成多样化且真实的人体运动有着巨大的希望。然而，现有的运动扩散模型在很大程度上忽视了扩散过程中的物理定律，并且经常产生物理上不可信的运动，并具有明显的伪影，例如漂浮、脚滑动和地面穿透。这严重影响了生成运动的质量并限制了它们的实际应用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的物理引导运动扩散模型（PhysDiff），它将物理约束纳入扩散过程。具体来说，我们提出了一种基于物理的运动投影模块，该模块使用物理模拟器中的运动模仿将扩散步骤的降噪运动投影为物理上合理的运动。投影运动进一步在下一个扩散步骤中用于指导去噪扩散过程。直观上，我们的模型中物理学的使用迭代地将运动拉向物理上合理的空间，这是通过简单的后处理无法实现的。对大规模人体运动数据集的实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的运动质量，并大幅提高了物理合理性（所有数据集>78%）。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合物理约束的扩散模型，以生成更真实的人体运动
AI.motivation: 现有模型忽视物理定律，导致生成的动作不真实，影响实际应用
AI.method: 设计物理引导的运动投影模块，利用物理模拟器在扩散步骤中生成符合物理规律的运动
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现最先进的运动质量，物理合理性提升超过78%
AI.conclusion: 物理引导的扩散模型能有效提升生成运动的物理合理性与质量

authors_text: Xinlong Wang,Wen Wang,Yue Cao,Chunhua Shen,Tiejun Huang
title: Images Speak in Images: A Generalist Painter for In-Context Visual Learning
title_zh: 图像以图像说话：情境视觉学习的多面手画家
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Code and model is available at: https://github.com/baaivision/Painter
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Code and model is available at: https://github.com/baaivision/Painter
abstract: In-context learning, as a new paradigm in NLP, allows the model to rapidly adapt to various tasks with only a handful of prompts and examples. But in computer vision, the difficulties for in-context learning lie in that tasks vary significantly in the output representations, thus it is unclear how to define the general-purpose task prompts that the vision model can understand and transfer to out-of-domain tasks. In this work, we present Painter, a generalist model which addresses these obstacles with an "image"-centric solution, that is, to redefine the output of core vision tasks as images, and specify task prompts as also images. With this idea, our training process is extremely simple, which performs standard masked image modeling on the stitch of input and output image pairs. This makes the model capable of performing tasks conditioned on visible image patches. Thus, during inference, we can adopt a pair of input and output images from the same task as the input condition, to indicate which task to perform. Without bells and whistles, our generalist Painter can achieve competitive performance compared to well-established task-specific models, on seven representative vision tasks ranging from high-level visual understanding to low-level image processing. In addition, Painter significantly outperforms recent generalist models on several challenging tasks.
summary: In-context learning, as a new paradigm in NLP, allows the model to rapidly adapt to various tasks with only a handful of prompts and examples. But in computer vision, the difficulties for in-context learning lie in that tasks vary significantly in the output representations, thus it is unclear how to define the general-purpose task prompts that the vision model can understand and transfer to out-of-domain tasks. In this work, we present Painter, a generalist model which addresses these obstacles with an "image"-centric solution, that is, to redefine the output of core vision tasks as images, and specify task prompts as also images. With this idea, our training process is extremely simple, which performs standard masked image modeling on the stitch of input and output image pairs. This makes the model capable of performing tasks conditioned on visible image patches. Thus, during inference, we can adopt a pair of input and output images from the same task as the input condition, to indicate which task to perform. Without bells and whistles, our generalist Painter can achieve competitive performance compared to well-established task-specific models, on seven representative vision tasks ranging from high-level visual understanding to low-level image processing. In addition, Painter significantly outperforms recent generalist models on several challenging tasks.
abstract_zh: 情境学习作为自然语言处理的一种新范式，只需少量提示和示例即可使模型快速适应各种任务。但在计算机视觉中，上下文学习的困难在于任务的输出表示差异很大，因此尚不清楚如何定义视觉模型可以理解并迁移到域外任务的通用任务提示。在这项工作中，我们提出了Painter，一个通才模型，它通过以“图像”为中心的解决方案来解决这些障碍，即将核心视觉任务的输出重新定义为图像，并将任务提示指定为图像。有了这个想法，我们的训练过程就变得非常简单，只需对输入和输出图像对的拼接执行标准的蒙版图像建模即可。这使得模型能够执行以可见图像块为条件的任务。因此，在推理过程中，我们可以采用来自同一任务的一对输入和输出图像作为输入条件，来指示要执行哪个任务。与成熟的特定任务模型相比，我们的多面手 Painter 在没有花哨的情况下，可以在从高级视觉理解到低级图像处理的七种代表性视觉任务上实现具有竞争力的性能。此外，Painter 在几个具有挑战性的任务上显着优于最新的通用模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Painter，一种基于图像的通用视觉模型，通过重新定义视觉任务的输出为图像并使用图像作为任务提示，实现上下文感知的视觉学习。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉任务的输出表示差异大，难以定义通用任务提示，导致上下文学习效果受限。需探索统一的图像表示方法以适应多样化任务。
AI.method: 将核心视觉任务输出统一为图像，通过输入-输出图像对进行拼接并执行标准掩码图像建模训练，使模型能根据可见图像块条件执行任务。
AI.result: Painter在7个代表性视觉任务中达到与专用模型相当的性能，并在多个挑战性任务上显著优于近期通用模型。
AI.conclusion: Painter通过图像中心的解决方案，为上下文视觉学习提供了简单有效的通用模型框架，展示了跨任务适应的潜力。

search_text: Images Speak in Images: A Generalist Painter for In-Context Visual Learning 图像以图像说话：情境视觉学习的多面手画家 In-context learning, as a new paradigm in NLP, allows the model to rapidly adapt to various tasks with only a handful of prompts and examples. But in computer vision, the difficulties for in-context learning lie in that tasks vary significantly in the output representations, thus it is unclear how to define the general-purpose task prompts that the vision model can understand and transfer to out-of-domain tasks. In this work, we present Painter, a generalist model which addresses these obstacles with an "image"-centric solution, that is, to redefine the output of core vision tasks as images, and specify task prompts as also images. With this idea, our training process is extremely simple, which performs standard masked image modeling on the stitch of input and output image pairs. This makes the model capable of performing tasks conditioned on visible image patches. Thus, during inference, we can adopt a pair of input and output images from the same task as the input condition, to indicate which task to perform. Without bells and whistles, our generalist Painter can achieve competitive performance compared to well-established task-specific models, on seven representative vision tasks ranging from high-level visual understanding to low-level image processing. In addition, Painter significantly outperforms recent generalist models on several challenging tasks. 情境学习作为自然语言处理的一种新范式，只需少量提示和示例即可使模型快速适应各种任务。但在计算机视觉中，上下文学习的困难在于任务的输出表示差异很大，因此尚不清楚如何定义视觉模型可以理解并迁移到域外任务的通用任务提示。在这项工作中，我们提出了Painter，一个通才模型，它通过以“图像”为中心的解决方案来解决这些障碍，即将核心视觉任务的输出重新定义为图像，并将任务提示指定为图像。有了这个想法，我们的训练过程就变得非常简单，只需对输入和输出图像对的拼接执行标准的蒙版图像建模即可。这使得模型能够执行以可见图像块为条件的任务。因此，在推理过程中，我们可以采用来自同一任务的一对输入和输出图像作为输入条件，来指示要执行哪个任务。与成熟的特定任务模型相比，我们的多面手 Painter 在没有花哨的情况下，可以在从高级视觉理解到低级图像处理的七种代表性视觉任务上实现具有竞争力的性能。此外，Painter 在几个具有挑战性的任务上显着优于最新的通用模型。 本文提出Painter，一种基于图像的通用视觉模型，通过重新定义视觉任务的输出为图像并使用图像作为任务提示，实现上下文感知的视觉学习。 Xinlong Wang,Wen Wang,Yue Cao,Chunhua Shen,Tiejun Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Albert J. Zhai,Shenlong Wang
title: PEANUT: Predicting and Navigating to Unseen Targets
title_zh: PEANUT：预测和导航到看不见的目标
abstract: Efficient ObjectGoal navigation (ObjectNav) in novel environments requires an understanding of the spatial and semantic regularities in environment layouts. In this work, we present a straightforward method for learning these regularities by predicting the locations of unobserved objects from incomplete semantic maps. Our method differs from previous prediction-based navigation methods, such as frontier potential prediction or egocentric map completion, by directly predicting unseen targets while leveraging the global context from all previously explored areas. Our prediction model is lightweight and can be trained in a supervised manner using a relatively small amount of passively collected data. Once trained, the model can be incorporated into a modular pipeline for ObjectNav without the need for any reinforcement learning. We validate the effectiveness of our method on the HM3D and MP3D ObjectNav datasets. We find that it achieves the state-of-the-art on both datasets, despite not using any additional data for training.
summary: Efficient ObjectGoal navigation (ObjectNav) in novel environments requires an understanding of the spatial and semantic regularities in environment layouts. In this work, we present a straightforward method for learning these regularities by predicting the locations of unobserved objects from incomplete semantic maps. Our method differs from previous prediction-based navigation methods, such as frontier potential prediction or egocentric map completion, by directly predicting unseen targets while leveraging the global context from all previously explored areas. Our prediction model is lightweight and can be trained in a supervised manner using a relatively small amount of passively collected data. Once trained, the model can be incorporated into a modular pipeline for ObjectNav without the need for any reinforcement learning. We validate the effectiveness of our method on the HM3D and MP3D ObjectNav datasets. We find that it achieves the state-of-the-art on both datasets, despite not using any additional data for training.
abstract_zh: 新环境中的高效对象目标导航 (ObjectNav) 需要了解环境布局中的空间和语义规律。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过从不完整的语义图中预测未观察到的对象的位置来学习这些规律的简单方法。我们的方法不同于以前基于预测的导航方法，例如前沿潜力预测或以自我为中心的地图完成，通过直接预测看不见的目标，同时利用所有先前探索的区域的全局背景。我们的预测模型是轻量级的，可以使用相对少量的被动收集的数据以监督方式进行训练。经过训练后，该模型可以合并到 ObjectNav 的模块化管道中，而无需任何强化学习。我们在 HM3D 和 MP3D ObjectNav 数据集上验证了我们的方法的有效性。我们发现它在两个数据集上都达到了最先进的水平，尽管没有使用任何额外的数据进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PEANUT方法，通过预测未观察到的对象位置来实现高效的目标导航。
AI.motivation: 现有基于预测的导航方法（如前沿势预测或自中心地图补全）未能有效利用全局上下文信息，且通常需要强化学习。
AI.method: 设计轻量级预测模型，从已探索区域的全局上下文中直接预测未见目标位置，无需强化学习，通过监督学习训练。
AI.result: 在HM3D和MP3D数据集上达到最先进水平，且未使用额外训练数据。
AI.conclusion: PEANUT通过全局上下文预测实现了高效导航，证明了无需强化学习的预测方法的有效性。

authors_text: Rohith Agaram,Shaurya Dewan,Rahul Sajnani,Adrien Poulenard,Madhava Krishna,Srinath Sridhar
title: Canonical Fields: Self-Supervised Learning of Pose-Canonicalized Neural Fields
title_zh: 规范场：姿势规范化神经场的自监督学习
abstract: Coordinate-based implicit neural networks, or neural fields, have emerged as useful representations of shape and appearance in 3D computer vision. Despite advances, however, it remains challenging to build neural fields for categories of objects without datasets like ShapeNet that provide "canonicalized" object instances that are consistently aligned for their 3D position and orientation (pose). We present Canonical Field Network (CaFi-Net), a self-supervised method to canonicalize the 3D pose of instances from an object category represented as neural fields, specifically neural radiance fields (NeRFs). CaFi-Net directly learns from continuous and noisy radiance fields using a Siamese network architecture that is designed to extract equivariant field features for category-level canonicalization. During inference, our method takes pre-trained neural radiance fields of novel object instances at arbitrary 3D pose and estimates a canonical field with consistent 3D pose across the entire category. Extensive experiments on a new dataset of 1300 NeRF models across 13 object categories show that our method matches or exceeds the performance of 3D point cloud-based methods.
summary: Coordinate-based implicit neural networks, or neural fields, have emerged as useful representations of shape and appearance in 3D computer vision. Despite advances, however, it remains challenging to build neural fields for categories of objects without datasets like ShapeNet that provide "canonicalized" object instances that are consistently aligned for their 3D position and orientation (pose). We present Canonical Field Network (CaFi-Net), a self-supervised method to canonicalize the 3D pose of instances from an object category represented as neural fields, specifically neural radiance fields (NeRFs). CaFi-Net directly learns from continuous and noisy radiance fields using a Siamese network architecture that is designed to extract equivariant field features for category-level canonicalization. During inference, our method takes pre-trained neural radiance fields of novel object instances at arbitrary 3D pose and estimates a canonical field with consistent 3D pose across the entire category. Extensive experiments on a new dataset of 1300 NeRF models across 13 object categories show that our method matches or exceeds the performance of 3D point cloud-based methods.
abstract_zh: 基于坐标的隐式神经网络或神经场已成为 3D 计算机视觉中形状和外观的有用表示。然而，尽管取得了进步，但如果没有像 ShapeNet 这样提供“规范化”对象实例（其 3D 位置和方向（姿势）一致对齐）的数据集，为对象类别构建神经场仍然具有挑战性。我们提出了规范场网络 (CaFi-Net)，这是一种自监督方法，用于规范化来自表示为神经场（特别是神经辐射场 (NeRF)）的对象类别的实例的 3D 姿态。 CaFi-Net 使用 Siamese 网络架构直接从连续和噪声辐射场中学习，该网络架构旨在提取等变场特征以进行类别级规范化。在推理过程中，我们的方法采用任意 3D 姿势的新对象实例的预训练神经辐射场，并估计整个类别中具有一致 3D 姿势的规范场。对涵盖 13 个对象类别的 1300 个 NeRF 模型的新数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们的方法匹配或超过了基于 3D 点云的方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法CaFi-Net，用于对神经辐射场（NeRF）表示的物体类别实例进行三维姿态归一化，无需依赖预对齐数据集。
AI.motivation: 坐标基隐式神经网络在3D视觉中广泛应用，但缺乏类似ShapeNet的标准化数据集时，难以实现跨类别的姿态一致化建模。
AI.method: 基于孪生网络架构，直接从连续噪声辐射场中学习等变特征，通过自监督学习实现类别级姿态归一化。
AI.result: 在包含1300个NeRF模型的13类物体数据集上，方法性能达到或超越基于3D点云的方法。
AI.conclusion: CaFi-Net为无需预对齐数据的神经场姿态标准化提供了有效解决方案，推动了类别级神经场建模的发展。

authors_text: Maysam Behmanesh,Maximilian Krahn,Maks Ovsjanikov
title: TIDE: Time Derivative Diffusion for Deep Learning on Graphs
title_zh: TIDE：图深度学习的时间导数扩散
abstract: A prominent paradigm for graph neural networks is based on the message-passing framework. In this framework, information communication is realized only between neighboring nodes. The challenge of approaches that use this paradigm is to ensure efficient and accurate long-distance communication between nodes, as deep convolutional networks are prone to oversmoothing. In this paper, we present a novel method based on time derivative graph diffusion (TIDE) to overcome these structural limitations of the message-passing framework. Our approach allows for optimizing the spatial extent of diffusion across various tasks and network channels, thus enabling medium and long-distance communication efficiently. Furthermore, we show that our architecture design also enables local message-passing and thus inherits from the capabilities of local message-passing approaches. We show that on both widely used graph benchmarks and synthetic mesh and graph datasets, the proposed framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin
summary: A prominent paradigm for graph neural networks is based on the message-passing framework. In this framework, information communication is realized only between neighboring nodes. The challenge of approaches that use this paradigm is to ensure efficient and accurate long-distance communication between nodes, as deep convolutional networks are prone to oversmoothing. In this paper, we present a novel method based on time derivative graph diffusion (TIDE) to overcome these structural limitations of the message-passing framework. Our approach allows for optimizing the spatial extent of diffusion across various tasks and network channels, thus enabling medium and long-distance communication efficiently. Furthermore, we show that our architecture design also enables local message-passing and thus inherits from the capabilities of local message-passing approaches. We show that on both widely used graph benchmarks and synthetic mesh and graph datasets, the proposed framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a significant margin
abstract_zh: 图神经网络的一个突出范例是基于消息传递框架。在该框架中，信息通信仅在相邻节点之间实现。使用这种范式的方法的挑战是确保节点之间高效且准确的长距离通信，因为深度卷积网络容易过度平滑。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于时间导数图扩散（TIDE）的新颖方法来克服消息传递框架的这些结构限制。我们的方法可以优化各种任务和网络渠道之间的扩散空间范围，从而有效地实现中长距离通信。此外，我们表明我们的架构设计还支持本地消息传递，因此继承了本地消息传递方法的功能。我们表明，在广泛使用的图形基准以及合成网格和图形数据集上，所提出的框架明显优于最先进的方法

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间导数图扩散（TIDE）的新方法，以解决图神经网络中消息传递框架的长距离通信效率与过平滑问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络的消息传递框架仅限于邻近节点通信，难以高效实现长距离信息传递，且深度网络易导致过平滑问题。
AI.method: 通过时间导数图扩散（TIDE）优化扩散空间范围，结合局部消息传递机制，实现中长距离通信与局部信息处理的统一。
AI.result: 在多个主流图基准数据集和合成数据集上，TIDE框架显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: TIDE方法有效克服了消息传递框架的结构限制，提升了图神经网络在长距离通信与模型表达能力上的表现。
